Infernus.description: Infernus is a Hero in Deadlock . He is an Ixian with a powerful control of flame that he uses to enhance his speed and ignite his enemies. Combining his Flame Dash with the ability to spew a Napalm catalyst, Infernus can chase down and ignite his foes with a deadly Afterburn. Any targets left standing will be subject to his explosive Concussive Combustion, knocking them out and leaving them vulnerable to further immolation.
Infernus.lore:
“
Like most teenagers; Infernus was wild, rebellious, and impetuous.  Unlike most teenagers, Infernus was a creature from another plane and had a supernatural mastery over fire.  Needless to say:  his youth was filled with no small amount of arson, murder, and evidence disposal.  But that was then.  Now an adult, Infernus has mellowed out considerably.  He’s happy working at a bar with good live music, and talking to interesting people.  That being said when someone at the bar gets belligerent or violent, he’s not afraid to dust off the skills he once honed.
Infernus' motivation in the ritual is to prevent
Jezebel's Billiards Hall
, the bar he tends to, from closing down.
The bar is under threat of closure due to a variety of code violations caught by the Alchemy Bureau.
Infernus mainly wants to save the bar for the sake of his friend/boss
Hank
, the owner of Jezebel's, because Hank "saved his life".
Hank doesn't know that Infernus is participating in the ritual.
As a second generation
Ixian
immigrant,
Infernus was born and raised in
New York
and has never visited Ixia.
He considers New York his home and doesn't follow news about Ixia or the Ixian war.
Infernus doesn't know how to speak Ixian because his parents only ever spoke English around him.
Infernus used to work for the
Mendoza Syndicate
before he got replaced by
Vyper
.
It's implied that he killed people at "Pier 31" during his youth.
When he was roughly 18 years old, he "needed help, and someone gave it to him",
likely referring to Hank saving his life and allowing him to leave his life of crime behind.
Infernus is haunted by his past and worries that he'll enjoy the thrills of the ritual and potentially fall back into a life of crime.
Infernus claims to make the best sidecar in Manhattan.
Infernus is always well-dressed.

"Hank is in trouble, Infernus, and you alone have the power to save him."
Infernus

"Sometimes, you gotta go to extremes to help your friends."

Seven.description: Seven is a Hero in Deadlock . A visionary who aims to continuously grow his power, Seven excels in rapidly taking control of the battlefield by denying areas with Lightning Balls and Surging his gun to punish his foes for staying close together. After showing his enemies their place with Static Charge, Seven is free to discharge himself into a Storm Cloud and fry them like a microwave casserole.
Seven.lore:
“
When mystic energy awoke on Earth, the world changed... anything was possible.  But just because anything WAS possible, didn’t mean that anything SHOULD be possible.  And so the government made rules.   Laws.  A means for US citizens to enjoy the benefits of the supernatural world in safety.  But rules and laws are for lesser men.  Men with limitations.  Men who were not Seven.
There are many rumors about what Seven did to land himself in Lost Whisper, an oubliette for the most dangerous of occultists.  But there is no doubt about what happened on the night of his execution.
Wards placed by the most powerful ritualists of 7 different nations… wards designed to not just prevent mystical interference with the execution, but to simultaneously obliterate Seven's soul so that it could never be contacted, resurrected, or otherwise be used by someone looking to follow in his footsteps... failed.
Onlookers viewed in horror as the strongest mentalist employed by the US Army’s head popped like a grape.  They screamed as Scotland Yard’s premiere occult investigator, the one who allegedly captured Seven, crumbled to ash.  Seven's body buckled and writhed against his restraints; his skin burning from eldritch electricity... and yet he would not die.  He laughed.
He laughed as he tore himself free from his bondage.
He laughed as his captors cowered in fear.
He laughed as he massacred his tormentors.
He laughed as he tasted the fresh air that was denied to him for years.
And he laughed when he thought about what he was going to do once he reached New York City.
Seven's motive and wish in the ritual is to achieve "apotheosis,"
which means the glorification of a subject to divine level,
meaning that Seven wants to become a god, or gain godlike powers.
Seven believes he will become powerful enough for the
Patrons
to bow to him.
Seven claims he was imprisoned in
Lost Whisper
because he "offended small-minded simpletons with fragile egos".
Seven implies getting caught and sent to Lost Whisper was part of his plan.
How Seven survived the botched execution is unknown, but he seems to have died in the process, which could mean he's undead.
Seven says he doesn't like murder, rather, he is "indifferent" to it.
He does enjoy letting fear sink into his victims, however.
Seven has done research on the
Astral Gates
, and he credits
Professor Dynamo
as an influence in his work.
Seven mentions that he once loved someone.
According to the
Archmother
, Seven had a "destiny" which his lover tried to steal.
On the run from the
OSIC
, Seven currently lives in New York's old subway tunnels. He tells
Mo & Krill
he has "particular needs" regarding the creation of new tunnels.
Seven mentions that he had to "scurry with the rats since he was a child".
Seven can speak the
Ixian
language.
The New York Oracle
reporter
Allie Kincaid
is writing a story on Seven.
Seven
And

-
"Strive for apotheosis."

Vindicta.description: Vindicta is a Hero in Deadlock . She is a mobile and powerful marksman, engaging and picking off her targets from a distance. Using her Crow Familiar to initiate fights by bleeding her targets, Vindicta may launch into Flight to keep her distance from enemies and tether them with a Stake in the ground while targeting them with her powerful rifle. Enemies that are near-death should fear her ability to Assassinate at long-range with a devastating sniper shot.
Vindicta.lore:
“
A victim of John Hathorne during the Salem Witch Trials, Vindicta got a second chance of life when her spirit was brought back to the mortal plane during the first Maelstrom (the event that introduced the supernatural to the public at large).
Waging a one ghost war against "The Friends of Humanity", a neo inquisition formed by Hathorne's descendants; Vindicta looks to keep the supernatural safe from Hathorne's ilk, and she isn't afraid to stack as many bodies as needed to do it.
Vindicta says she was a child who was "unjustly condemned" during the
Salem Witch Trials.
John Hathorne
, who's mentioned in Vindicta's background, was known in the actual Salem Witch Trials for questioning accusers and the accused in trial, often leaving the accused guilty.
Vindicta's motivation in the ritual is to wipe out John Hathorne's bloodline and the Friends of Humanity.
Her main goal seems to be getting revenge on Hathorne's bloodline, with the destruction of the Friends of Humanity being a side benefit.
Vindicta says she's not a witch because, in her eyes, she doesn't have wants or dreams: only a lust for revenge.
Her main target is the current leader of the Friends of Humanity, also named
John Hathorne
, who is a descendant of the original Hathorne who killed her.
Vindicta has killed John Hathorne's brother while he was on a speedboat,
and assassinated someone else during the Boston Marathon.
Vindicta has been dead for roughly 200 years
before returning to life during the first Maelstrom (50 years before the events of the game).
Vindicta says she was "lost" for a while before finding her purpose of revenge.
While consumed by revenge, Vindicta ultimately sees her actions as her "saving life".
Vindicta says she uses her given name.
Puritans in the 17th Century were known to give unusual names to their children, as a way of honoring their religion.
Vindicta's exploits have been told about in
Ixia
. According to
Apollo
, Vindicta is called
"Hasha Vogali",
which is Ixian for "Death's Whisper".

Lady Geist.description: Lady Geist is a Hero in Deadlock . A socialite with a necromantic pact, Lady Geist consumes her own health for her abilities while draining the life away from opponents. Sacrificing her life force to launch Essence Bombs and Malice "Blood Shards", Lady Geist can regain lost health with Life Drain, sapping enemy heroes and units of their health. Her Soul Exchange swaps health values with an enemy hero, turning the odds against them for a killing blow.
Lady Geist.lore:
“
Once, Lady Jeanne Geist was the toast of the town.  But as time passed and her beauty faded she found herself further and further from her glory days in High Society until finally she was nothing more than a frail woman in a nursing home, telling stories of a glorious past.  And that’s when Oathkeeper revealed himself.  A powerful spirit from another plane, Oathkeeper offered her a path to reclaim her past glories… he could restore her youth; all she had to do was drain the essence of the living to sustain herself.
Geist was torn.  Obviously murder was ghoulish business, and undoubtedly Oathkeeper was not an entity that could be trusted… but still, the thought of having a second chance of reliving her youth was too good to pass up.  And so she concocted a plan: after making a pact with Oathkeeper she would bind and ward him, limiting his influence and pull over her.  Oathkeeper would still get fed; but on her terms, not his.
However, as years have turned to decades; the strength of the Ward has weakened, and Oathkeeper hungers more than he ever has in the past…
This section contains
spoilers
for
The Binding of Oathkeeper
.
Lady Jeanne Geist (married name) was born in France, in 1815. She married German artist
Johann Geist
.
Jeanne and Johann had a son named
Walter
in 1850, and Johann died in 1880.
Circa 1899
, when Jeanne was around 84 years old, the first
Maelstrom
happened, bringing various supernatural forces to Earth, and the spirit
Oathkeeper
was one of them. Jeanne made a pact with Oathkeeper to regain her youth in exchange for draining the life of others. She was initially reluctant, but accepted the deal. However, with the help of Walter, she made a ward to keep Oathkeeper under control. As the ward was "against the spirit of the deal," Oathkeeper promised to make Jeanne suffer if he ever broke free.
Walter had a son whom he named after his father,
Johann "Jr."
Johann Jr. became a doctor, and after Walter died, he did the maintenance of his grandmother's ward. Jeanne and Walter had "a terrible sense of humor", according to Johann Jr.
Now, 50 years after her initial pact and on the eve of the second Maelstrom, Geist has to decide how she'll deal with Oathkeeper, and whether she'll continue to kill others to stay young or accept her natural aging and eventual death.
While her exact motivations change depending on what path she takes in
The Binding of Oathkeeper
, Lady Geist's main goal in the ritual is to prevent Oathkeeper from breaking free and killing her.
Lady Geist holds her public image in extremely high regard.
Lady Geist is fashionable and well-versed in notable haberdasheries and brands.
Lady Geist seems to own a foundation for homeless people.
Johann Geist used to take her to "hundreds" of fundraisers in the past.
Lady Geist enjoys going to
Jezebel's
and offers to help prevent the bar from being shut down by the Alchemy Bureau.
She used to like the
Baroness Hotel
, but believes their "standards went to hell".
Lady Geist visited the
Paradox Museum
once, and thought it was "cliché and overwrought".
It's implied that, had Lady Geist made her deal with Oathkeeper transparent, she would've been hunted down by the
Baxter Society
.
The
OSIC
are aware of her deal with Oathkeeper and are keeping an eye on her, but haven't sent a Sandman after her yet.
Lady Geist's gun was a gift from Johann Geist.
Lady Geist's hair smells vaguely like flowers.

Abrams.description: Abrams is a Hero in Deadlock . He is a hard-boiled, hard-hitting bruiser of a character that focuses on engaging groups of enemies and relying on his high health, high damage output, and life draining ability to stay in the fight. With a powerful area stun and a devastating shoulder charge, Abrams can isolate fragile targets from the rest of the team and set-up his more damaging allies to finish them off.
Abrams.lore:
“
Hard hitting, hard headed, and hard drinking; Detective Abrams has been a fixture on the New York investigating scene for years.  From stolen art, to missing persons, to ritual murders; Abrams didn't just take any case that came across his desk... he solved them.
But his days of following cheating spouses came to an end the day he opened his office door and found The Tome sitting on his desk.
No instruction was left for him save for a brief note scrawled in onyx blood that read "Don't let them have it".  Abrams hasn't figured where the thing came from; but seeing as his home has been broken into, his office tossed on 3 different occasions, and his car firebombed he has a vested interest in figuring out what the hell is going on.
Abrams is
Ixian
.
He was born in Ixia and seems to speak their native language.
Unlike
Infernus
, Abrams does not demonstrate control over fire.
Abrams' goal in the ritual is to destroy the Tome.
Abrams expresses little control over the Tome.
The Tome often tries to fly away, which is weaponised by Abrams and allows him to cast Seismic Impact.
Abrams likes to drink whiskey.
He also frequents
Jezebel's
.
Outside of his case with the Tome, Abrams has also been investigating the
Paradox Organisation
.
He once worked alongside
Venator
on a case in the past.
Since his car was firebombed, Abrams has been forced to use the bus to get around.

Abrams Conversation 3

"I don't blame you for not having the stomach to do what needed to be done, but sleep easy knowing that what happening in that brownstone is my burden alone, not yours."
Rem

Wraith.description: Wraith is a Hero in Deadlock . She is a fast-talking and fast-firing combatant with potent offensive abilities and mobility. She can activate her Full Auto to boost her own fire rate, perform Card Tricks by sending them at her targets and Project Mind to teleport either into or out of dangerous fights. Singling out a foe with her Telekinesis and throwing them into any direction, Wraith can decide who on the enemy team should die first.
Wraith.lore:
“
The cornerstone of the New York gambling scene, Wraith's organization is about as open a secret as it comes.  However, thanks to a non-trivial amount of bribes, shakedowns, and blackmail, Wraith knows that she's above the law.
Wraith's motivation for being in the ritual isn't clear, but it seems to be for a chance to get more wealth, popularity and power.
Wraith mentions that she wants to keep her wish as simple as possible to avoid loopholes.
Wraith hosts weekly underground poker games.
She also makes bets on fights in the
Bear Pit
.
Wraith describes herself as a "degenerate gambler",
"a female entrepreneur in a male-dominated industry" and "Florence Nightingale with a gun".
Wraith loves gambling because the nerves she gets from it make her feel alive.
She often offers to make bets with her teammates.
Wraith owns a casino, which acts as her main base of operations.
As part of her business, Wraith lets customers take out markers from her. Her plan usually involves gambling with people until they owe her money, which forces them to take out markers.
Wraith claims to have built her criminal organisation herself, rather than inheriting it.
Wraith has done business with the
Mendoza Syndicate
in the past,
although she dislikes
Mendoza
himself.
Wraith shows interest in working with the
Seventh Moon
,
but ultimately views them as a rival organisation.
The
OSIC
are aware of Wraith's business, but aren't interested in dismantling it.
Wraith has bribed some of the New York police to leave her business alone,
and she isn't concerned about
Captain Murphy
.
Wraith employs
Ivy
's sister,
Sophia Arroyo
, to work for Wraith as an accountant to finance her college tuition.
Wraith makes Sophia work long shifts, which makes Sophia tired and affects her academic studies.
Wraith has a long list of people she wants dead.
Wraith wants to get an introduction to
Maximilian Fairfax
and
Apollo
's father.
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Wraith start):
"Wealth, power, and so much more await once you complete the ritual."
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Wraith start):
"You're torn between your desire to be feared and your desire to be loved, today you will be both."
Archmother
's in-game
voice line
(Wraith start):
"Wraith. Summon the Archmother, so that she may guide you to a new era of prosperity and strength."
Wraith
And

' in-game
voice line

' in-game

"I see you at the game Friday, Wraith."

McGinnis.description: McGinnis is a Hero in Deadlock . She wields a machine gun and her abilities revolve around the usage of structures like Mini Turrets and Spectral Walls, which she can create to support allies and hold down positions to the benefit of her team. If the situation goes awry and Medicinal Specter is insufficient, she can unleash a devastating Heavy Barrage at her enemies.
McGinnis.lore:
“
Maggie McGinnis always had a knack for building things.  At 4 she was using Lincoln Logs to recreate architectural marvels.  At 10 she built and rewired a custom light fixture for her parent's anniversary.  At 15 she designed a machine that refined the souls of the dead...that last one got a little more attention than the Lincoln Logs.
Now the head of Fairfax Industries Military R&D department, McGinnis spends her time in the machine shop, not in a lab.  She's not interested in theory, to her science is magic you can touch.
McGinnis' wish is unknown, although it's implied that she's using the ritual as a chance to test some weaponry.
In
The Binding of Oathkeeper
, McGinnis helps Lady Geist due to the chance to "harness the power of a God".
McGinnis' first name is Margaret, but she goes by Maggie.
Maximilian Fairfax
"paraded McGinnis incessantly" to the
New York
elite when he first discovered her as a genius teenage inventor.
McGinnis was famously known as a "kid genius".
As the head engineer of Fairfax Industries Military R&D department, McGinnis brainstorms the occult war machines.
While it's unknown where McGinnis' inventions have been used, it's said that she may be resposible for millions of deaths.
As a "notorious misanthrope", McGinnis doesn't really care about the deaths she's caused or the sins of Fairfax Industries.
McGinnis thinks ethics are for scientists "that can't think big enough".
While McGinnis doesn't love working for
Fairfax Industries
, she's content with being a "wage slave" since she gets paid a fortune.
McGinnis was worried that she would lose her job when Fairfax lost the sovereignty of the
Island of Cadenza
to the US Government.
McGinnis is aware and makes it known that Spectral Wall usually backfires on her team.
McGinnis' equipment and weaponry is powered by souls.
McGinnis likes to drink beer.
McGinnis
' in-game
voice line
(Select):
"Ready to do some field testing."
McGinnis
' in-game
voice line
(Upgrade Heavy Barrage):
"Been waiting to test this for a while."
The Binding of Oathkeeper
-
Chapter 4A
-
McGinnis
:
"Give me a reason to help you. Something interesting." -
Lady Geist
:
"It will likely be 50 years before there's another maelstrom. Do you really want to wait that long before you try to harness the power of a God?" -
McGinnis
:
"Now we're talking."
2025-01-28 -
Kaori
; Deadlock Discord -
"Maggie is short for Margaret, but she goes by Maggie"

-
Chapter 3A

"Yamato, you run a street gang. I drive the occult industrial complex. You never had a chance."
McGinnis

"I'm the lead engineer for the occult industrial complex."

"Your mind is the engine that drives the occult war machine. Within a decade your inventions will claim millions of lives, if they haven't already."

's in-game

"Your creations are responsible for the deaths of millions, McGinnis, you’re a monster.

"Presumably walking home drunk after a Fairfax Industries holiday party, notorious misanthrope Maggie McGinnis has been seen looking festive!"

' in-game

"Do I love working for Fairfax Industries? No. Does it pay a small fortune? Yes. How do I sleep at night? Like a baby."
McGinnis
And

-
"And if Carlos paid my mortgage, I might care what he had to say."

' in-game

And

- McGinnis:
"I was just a kid freaking out 'cause I thought I was going to lose my job but, Fairfax was surprisingly calm. I don't think he expected Cadenza to last forever. He just wanted to make the most out of an opportunity before legislation caught up. Plus, the guy gets to say he created one of the United States!"
Newscaster
's in-game
voice line
-
"The Supreme Court is poised to rule on the Fairfax Fair Tax bill next session. Will our 50th state remain in the union? Or will Fairfax Industries successfully regain its sovereignty over the island of Cadenza? Only time will tell!"
McGinnis
' in-game
voice line
(pre-game ping):
"Just wanna get ahead of this: I will probably misuse the wall at some point, and I'm sorry in advance."
McGinnis
' in-game
voice line
(upgrade Spectral Wall):
"If this misfires, my team won't let me hear the end of it."
McGinnis
And

-
"Just wanna get this out of the way. I'm gonna be doing my best to support you but, shit happens and if you end up on the wrong side of a spectral wall... I'm sorry."
-
"That was... very specific."
-
"It happens a lot."
McGinnis

"How do you not throw out your back carrying all that stuff?"

"It's lighter than it looks. Souls don't weigh a whole lot."

Paradox.description: Paradox is a Hero in Deadlock . She wields time manipulation with potent disruption and slowing abilities. With a charged Kinetic Carbine, she can threaten her enemies at any range while damaging and slowing them with thrown Pulse Grenades and well-placed Time Walls. At just the right moment, Paradox can activate her Paradoxical Swap to change places with her target, dropping them into a dangerous situation amongst her team.
Paradox.lore:
“
Paradox.  An artifact of time, and the name of a notorious thieves' guild... one that prides themselves on constructing elaborate heists that target the most untouchable of individuals and institutions.  What does Paradox do with the countless artifacts, state secrets, and celebrity paternity tests that they have stolen?  Put it on display at pop-up museums, so that they can show the world that no one is out of Paradox’s reach.
Shrouded in mystery, each member of Paradox dons a mask and takes on the organization's name.  They are everywhere.  They are nowhere.  And if they want something, they are inevitable.
Paradox has a few motivations in the ritual, the main one being to prove her herself to the
Paradox Organisation
, partially for bragging rights.
It's implied that one of Paradox's goals in the ritual is to steal something from the opposing Patron (such as the
Hidden King
's crown) and display it at the
Paradox Museum
.
It's also implied that Paradox wants to show that she's fit to lead the Paradox Organisation by completing the ritual.
Her exact wish is unknown, but there are dozens of possibilities according to the
Patrons
.
Not much is known about Paradox herself. She's Scottish and a "bored rich person",
who gladly gave up her identity to join the Paradox Organisation.
The helmet Paradox wears can be taken off (as it's just a mask),
but what Paradox does in her free time is unknown.
Paradox is playful and jokey, but takes the name of the Paradox Organisation very seriously. She drops the humor if Paradox gets threatened or disrespected.
Paradox is nicknamed as "The Time Thief".
Paradox is currently trying to find a way to break into the
Baxter Society
's manor house,
the
Baroness Hotel
,
and
McGinnis
' lab.
How the time manipulation Paradox uses works is a tightly held secret.
Paradox says time travel "isn't a thing yet".
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Paradox Start):
"Complete the ritual, and be the envy of your fellows in Paradox!"
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Paradox Start):
"This is the moment you've been waiting for. To prove to the world you're as good as you claim to be. Don't let yourself down. Summon the Hidden King!"
Archmother
's in-game
voice line
(Paradox Start):
"You seek the validation of your colleagues, Paradox? Then steal the crown of the Hidden King and become legend!"
Paradox
's in-game
voice line
(Post-Game Ping):
"Can't wait to tell the Paradox Council about this."
Paradox
's in-game
voice line
(Post-Game Ping):
"This is going to make a hell of an exhibit in the museum."
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Paradox Start):
"Paradox. Today marks the greatest heist you've ever performed. Don't fail your King."
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Paradox start) -
"Once you summon the Hidden King, the other members of Paradox will know why you are fit to lead."
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Paradox Start):
"Paradox, your mind is ablaze with possibilities. I look forward to seeing what you claim as your reward for completing the ritual."
Paradox
And
Haze Conversation 2
-
"This may surprise you, Haze, but as a Scottish woman I don't particularly give a shit about American artifacts."
Paradox
And
Lady Geist Conversation 3
-
"I'm assuming your ilk likes to brag about what they stole."
-
"We're a bunch of bored rich people, of course we brag about what we stole."
Paradox
's in-game
voice line
(Select):
"I gave up my name to join Paradox. And it's a choice I would gladly make again."
Paradox

-
"You think I keep this on all the time?"
Paradox
And

-
"So, what's your story, lady? You fall in a vat of clocks?"
-
"It's not wise to mock Paradox."

"You can't keep me out of The Baroness forever, Doorman!"

And

"Time travel isn't a thing... yet."

Dynamo.description: Professor Dynamo is a Hero in Deadlock . He is a man of wit, using his brain and his brawn to provide support to his teammates by healing them, teleporting them, knocking his opponents into the air, and when the time is right, unleashing a Singularity which can drastically shift the tides of battle.
Dynamo.lore:
“
As a Scientist, Professor Dynamo always had an inquisitive mind.  So when a rift in space and time opened up in central park he was first on the scene to investigate – and while he expected such a majestic sight to be life changing, he was thinking more in a metaphorical way as opposed to having his body atomized and reduced to a tiny dying star.
But while his body is gone, his spirit and lust for knowledge lives on.  A tenured professor at Columbia College, Dynamo looks to learn more about his condition while maintaining his class load, after all: he has future minds to inspire.
Dynamo's wish and motivation in the ritual is to get his human body back.
Dynamo lost his body 50 years before the ritual, during the first
Maelstrom
.
He has not touched an
Astral Gate
since his body was transformed,
although he has done a lot of research into Astral Gates.
Dynamo is married to a woman named Marla.
They have been married for 31 years.
Marla bakes Dynamo key lime pies, even though he can't eat them.
The first thing Dynamo intends to do once he gets his body back is to "give Marla a hug and not let go for about 3 months."
Dynamo and Marla have visited the
Paradox Museum
.
During the winter season, Dynamo and Marla go carolling together.
Dynamo built and designed his own gun, the "Vonnegun".
Dynamo's connections in science and academia are described as "vast".
Dynamo's youth as an undergraduate student involved a lot of fist fights.
Dynamo prefers working with people as opposed to lying to them, as shown when confronting Wraith.
Dynamo likes to go to the New York Library to think.
He hopes to visit South Ixia someday.
Dynamo isn't a fan of the
Occult Industrial Complex
.
Dynamo appreciates the work of the
Baxter Society
.
In a
Winter season
voice line, Dynamo says he didn't sleep the night before the
Maelstrom
because he was "afraid of death".
Dynamo
's in-game
voice line
(high killstreak):
"No one will stop me from getting my body back!"
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Dynamo start):
"Your lust for knowledge changed your body. Are you strong enough to do what it takes to change it back?"
Archmother
's in-game
voice line
(Dynamo start):
"Your wife seeks to embrace flesh, not steel. Don't fail her. Don't fail yourself. Complete the ritual."
Warden
's background -
"Most people think the supernatural came into the world 50 years ago. (...) When the portal opened in Central Park, Warden’s parents realized not only was everything they were told was true, they were unprepared."
Dynamo
's in-game
voice line
(lost match) -
"It's okay, I've... I've grown used to this body. I can wait another fifty years."
Dynamo
And
Grey Talon Conversation 1
-
"Have you been to Ixia, Professor?"
-
"I won't lie: After what happened to my body, I decided to stay clear of Astral Gates. But I hear that South Ixia is beautiful."
Dynamo
And
Seven Conversation 2
-
"I'm a fan of your work, Professor."
-
"I am... flattered and horrified in equal measure."
-
"Your research into the Astral Gates paved the way for my own. In my rare moments of doubt, sometimes I even wonder if I would have become the man I am were it not for you."
Newscaster Headline 16
:
"Read our exclusive interview with
Professor Dynamo
to hear his thoughts on
Astral Gates
, the eclipse, and what it's like to live life without a body."
Dynamo
's in-game
voice line

"For a minute there, I thought Marla was going to be a widow!"
Dynamo and Kelvin conversation
Dynamo
And

's in-game
voice line
(pre-game ping):
"I don't wanna get you all too excited, but Marla gave me one of her famous key lime pies to share after we win."
Dynamo
And

-
"What's the first thing you're gonna do when The Lash gets your body back?"
-
"I believe you mean the Patron. But to answer your question... give Marla a hug and not let go for about 3 months."
Dynamo
And
Paradox Conversation 2
-
"I took Marla to the last pop-up. Truly... wonderful things to behold."
-
"I think you'll enjoy our next event. I'll make sure you get in."
-
"I can't wait!"
Shopkeeper
's in-game
voice line
(buy T4 item during Winter Update):
"It was great seeing you and Marla caroling last night, professor!"
Dynamo
And
McGinnis Conversation 3
-
"Neat gun!"
-
"Thanks. I designed it myself."
The Binding of Oathkeeper
-
Chapter 2a
-
Lady Geist
:

Dynamo
's in-game
voice line
(generic melee kill):
"This takes me back to undergrad."
Dynamo
's in-game
voice line

Kelvin.description: Kelvin is a Hero in Deadlock . He is a dedicated, undead scientist with a bevy of freezing abilities to slow his enemies and heal allies. He can conjure an Ice Path under his feet for faster movement for himself and his team, throwing Frost Grenades and  firing his Arctic Beam at nearby enemies to set them up for his companions' attacks. Tactical usage of his Frozen Shelter ice dome can protect and heal allies while trapping hapless opponents.
Kelvin.lore:
“
A famed adventuring scientist, Kelvin made it his life's mission to explore and understand the unknowable.  So naturally when rumors surfaced regarding an 8th astral gate hidden in the arctic, Kelvin couldn't build an expedition team fast enough.  Assembling the brightest minds of his generation, Kelvin and his team set forth with much fanfare.
They never returned.
A year and a half later the frozen body of Kelvin was found by a fishing trawler, his corpse clutching a rock etched with glowing runes.  The crew chipped away at the ice, looking to get a closer look at the body and were shocked when Kelvin opened his eyes.  They checked his vitals... there was no pulse.  They sought to bandage his open wounds... there was no blood.  And yet, impossibly, Kelvin was "alive".
Having no memory of what happened on the expedition, Kelvin is looking for answers.
Kelvin's motivation and wish in the ritual is to rediscover what happened during the expedition to the Arctic.
Kelvin allegedly wrestles with a lot of guilt about the expedition.
He's been meeting with family members of his crewmates who never returned from it.
Despite the guilt, Kelvin remains optimistic about the ritual and his future.
Kelvin is consistently called an "Ice Wight" due to his undead state.
Kelvin believes the correct term is "Revenant", although he's unsure if there's really a difference.
Kelvin views his undead state as a gift.
The
OSIC
want to ask Kelvin questions about his condition.
Kelvin hasn't taken off his parka since the expedition just in case the glowing rock strapped to his body is the only thing keeping him alive.
As a famous explorer, Kelvin has written successful books about his adventures.
One of his past expeditions was located at
Ixia
.
Kelvin exhibits a boastful personality.
He seems to have a reputation for being a little judgmental.
Kelvin's ice abilities were created with a mix of science and magic.
They seem unrelated to his glowing rock or undead condition, although he claims to be the only person able to safely use Arctic Beam.
This is due to the fact that Kelvin doesn't get cold anymore.
Kelvin likes to drink
single malt Scotch
.
He used to frequent
Jezebel's
before his Arctic expedition.
Kelvin's parka smells.
One of Kelvin's old friends was someone named "Ettrick", who Kelvin pushed away due to Ettrick's ambitions.
At the fundraiser for Kelvin's Arctic expedition, Ettrick "made a scene". When Kelvin returned from the expedition, he tried to find Ettrick but couldn't.
Kelvin seems remorseful about Ettrick, and believes that "if someone's going to kill him, it's going to be Ettrick".
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Kelvin start):
"You have many questions that only the Hidden King can provide. Complete the ritual, and find the truth you seek."
Kelvin
And
Wraith Conversation 2
The Doorman
's in-game
voice line
(taunt Kelvin):
"You wrestle with so much guilt. The things you know you did and, even more horrifying, the things you forgot. But at The Baroness, you don’t need to worry about Ettrick or the expedition. Let me lighten the load."
Kelvin
's in-game
voice line
(unselect):
"I need to see the families of my crewmates."
Kelvin
And
Abrams Conversation 1
-
"If we work together, victory is assured."
-
"You're... the most confident dead man I've ever met."
-
"My friend, the grave has no time for pessimism."
Kelvin
And
Bebop Conversation 3
-

Haze.description: Haze is a Hero in Deadlock . She works as a secret agent in the Sandman Division of OSIC , fighting as a devastating assassin character with a specialty in isolating and eliminating her foes. Her Smoke Bomb lets her sneak up on enemies before knocking them out with a Sleep Dagger and unleashing a hail of gunfire at close range. In desperate situations, Haze can enter her Bullet Dance to avoid return fire while dispatching her remaining targets.
Haze.lore:
“
The Occult Security and Investigation Commission is a black box government organization that makes the CIA look transparent.  It falls on the men, women, and entities of the OSIC to keep the country safe from sinister forces that are beyond the capabilities of local law enforcement.
As a member of the notorious Sandman Division, Haze is routinely tasked with infiltrating the dreams of persons of interest, to assess their threat level, and if needed... to put them to sleep.
Haze is fighting in the
ritual
on behalf of the
OSIC
.
Her wish is unknown, although the
Patrons
tempt her to wish herself a new life.
She has prepared extensively for the ritual by performing drills, research, stretching, divination, and fortune telling.
Haze works for the OSIC because she "loves her country".
She acknowledges that the OSIC is flawed, but in her eyes the ends justify the means.
She is extremely loyal to her superiors and her job,
although it's implied that she doesn't love being a Sandman.
Haze is nicknamed "Dreamwalker" and "Dreamstalker".
Haze appreciates quality knifework.
Haze plays the cello for fun.
Haze
's in-game
voice line
(Select):
"I'm here on OSIC business."
Haze
's in-game
voice line
(Pre-Game Ping):
"This assignment keeps getting weirder."
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Haze Start):
"There is a life waiting for you, Haze, and once you complete the ritual, it can be yours."
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Haze Start):
"Haze, soon you will have to decide if you're summoning the Hidden King for the OSIC... or for yourself."
Archmother
's in-game
voice line
(Haze Start):
"You've walked through countless dreams, Haze. It's time to live your own."
Haze
And
Victor Conversation
-
"Are you kidding me? There's a mountain of things you can do to prepare. Drills, research, stretching… and that's not even dipping our toes in divination and fortu-"
Haze
And
Vindicta Conversation 2
-
"How can you work for them?"
-
"I love my country."
Haze
And
Vindicta Conversation 2
-
"I'm not a zealot. The OSIC isn't perfect and neither is the world. You of all people should understand that the ends justify the means."
The Doorman
's in-game
voice line
(Taunt Haze):
"The OSIC is lucky to have you, Haze. Your commitment to your work is an inspiration, but even you deserve some R&R. Why don’t you take a PTO day at The Baroness?"
Haze
's in-game
voice line
(Select):
"I dedicated my life to the OSIC. I won't fail them."
Haze
And
McGinnis Conversation 1
-
"Planning on transferring up here?"
-
"I'll go wherever they need me."
Haze
And
Abrams Conversation 1
-
"You like being a Sandman?"
-
"I'm good at my job."
-
"That's not what I asked."
Haze
And

-
"Smile, Haze. You're gonna like killing people with me."
-
"Being good at something and liking something are two different things."

's
other character interactions

-
"Not enough people appreciate quality blade work."

Haze

"I play the cello."

Holliday.description: Holliday is a Hero in Deadlock . She is a sheriff, relying on her aim with her trusty heirloom revolver and a litany of abilities to take down her enemies. With a Crackshot of her pistol, she can slow and damage her foes from a distance before launching an explosive Powder Keg with her Bounce Pad or a melee attack. To isolate her foes, she can wrangle them with her Lasso and drag them into the attacks of her allies.
Holliday.lore:
“
There are people who spent their whole lives dreaming about moving to New York.  Holliday isn't one of those people.  Content with being a Sheriff in a small town, Holliday enjoyed a career where the only time she had to use her gun was when trick shooting at the county fair...then the murders started.
Grisly and inhumane; the bodies were found with their ribcages ripped open... their innards picked apart as if by birds.  Holliday tracked down the killer, a travelling folk musician that the media dubbed "The Troubadour", but when she confronted him he exploded into a murder of crows and flew away.
That was 6 months ago, and while the murders in central Illinois have stopped, Holliday's investigation has not.  She believes that The Troubadour is travelling to New York, and when she finds him she's going to kill that evil son of a bitch.
Holliday's motivation and wish in the ritual is to catch and kill the
Troubadour
.
Holliday's visual novel
will tell the story of her hunt for the Troubadour.
Holliday is the granddaughter of Wild West gunslinger
Doc Holliday
.
Her revolver belonged to her grandfather and is seen as a "family heirloom."
She inherited her revolver from her father, who also trained her to use it.
She feels pressured by Doc Holliday's legacy and tries not to think about it,
but hopes her actions would make him proud.
Holliday's hometown is
Macomb, Illinois
.
She doesn't like big cities like
New York
or Chicago.
Holliday is vigilant as a law enforcer and takes her job seriously.
The
OSIC
have a file on her, where she's portrayed as "competent."
Holliday was traumatised by the Troubadour's murders.
She avoids sleeping because of the nightmares she gets.
Holliday hates the feeling of revenge, but feels like there's nothing else she can do about it.
Holliday had a sister who died.
Holliday has been married more than once,
and she doesn't want to have children.
Holliday's boots were a gift.
Holliday is described as a tourist,
but she has no intention of sightseeing.
Holliday wants to leave New York as soon as possible.
Holliday
's in-game
voice line
(select):
"When I find who I'm looking for, I'm not bringing him in. I'm putting him down."
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Holliday start):
"The Troubadour eludes you, Holliday, but the Hidden King can ensure that murderer gets what he deserves."
Archmother
's in-game
voice line
(Holliday start):
"You're a long way from home, Holliday, but you're so close to finding the killer you seek. Complete the ritual and the Archmother will ensure your success."
Holliday
And
Dynamo Conversation 3
-
"I just... I just hope you catch whoever's responsible."
-
"I'm not gonna catch him. I'm gonna kill him."
Archmother
's in-game
voice line
(Holliday start) -
"Holliday. Your grandfather casts a long shadow... but you can still make him proud. Summon the Archmother and she will help you find justice."
Haze
's in-game
voice line
(killed Holliday) -
"Your grandfather was a legend. You, however, are a disappointment."
Holliday
And
Abrams Conversation 3

Holliday

Bebop.description: Bebop is a Hero in Deadlock . A modified scrap golem with a big heart and a bigger extendable arm, Bebop is a potent threat on the battlefield when supported by his team. His Grappling Arm can pull friends and enemies alike towards him, saving them from certain doom or guaranteeing it. Bebop can attach Sticky Bombs to nearby foes and launch them in any direction with a powerful Exploding Uppercut. For any foes left standing, Bebop's Hyper Beam can cut across the battlefield and finish them off.
Bebop.lore:
“
Forged by the hands of a widowed junk yard attendant; Bebop was more than just some scrap golem laborer... he was the son she couldn't have.  Together they would work in the iron yard during the day, and listen to jazz at night. It was a predictable, if not comforting routine.  But now, Bebop's creator has fallen ill and while Miss Shelly wouldn't approve of the activities that Bebop does at night to pay for her medicine, what she doesn't know can't hurt her.
Bebop's motivation and wish in the ritual is to cure
Ms. Shelly
of her illness.
Ms. Shelly doesn't know that Bebop is attempting to summon the
Patrons
.
Bebop describes his creation as "an act of craftsmanship, willpower and sacrifice".
Bebop seems to have a soul.
Bebop's main source of income for Ms. Shelly's medicine is by fighting in the
Bear Pit
.
Once Ms. Shelly is cured of her illness, he intends to retire.
Bebop was created with access to his own free will.
While Bebop doesn't particularly value human life,
he knows Ms. Shelly wouldn't approve of him killing people.
Bebop also refers to Ms. Shelly as his "mother".
Bebop can speak French, but can't speak Japanese.
Bebop calls humans "organics".
Bebop knows how to bake biscuits.
Bebop
's in-game
voice line
(select):
"I'll do whatever it takes to save Ms. Shelly."
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Bebop start):
"Shelly Fisher is running out of time, Bebop. Don't fail her. Complete the ritual."
Bebop
's in-game
voice line

"Ms. Shelly probably wouldn't approve of what I'm about to do. Unfortunately for them, she's at home, resting."
Bebop
And

Bebop
And
Dynamo Conversation 1
-
"I thought I'd found a kindred spirit."
-
"Listen, we're both just a couple of floating souls in iron bodies. I think there's plenty of common ground."
Bebop
And
Ivy Conversation 2

's in-game
voice line
(Killed Bebop):
"Well, if I don't retake my company at least I have a future in the Bear Pit."
Bebop
's in-game
voice line
(Select):
"People get me all wrong. I'm not interested in violence for violence's sake! I'm interested in violence for money's sake."
Bebop
And
Mo & Krill Conversation 2
Bebop
And
McGinnis Conversation 3
-
"So, what sort of bindings did your creator put on you?"
-
"Oh, Ms. Shelly doesn't believe in that sort of thing."
Bebop
And

-
"You're not one of those machines that value human life, are you?"
-
"Not particularly. Beyond a few... notable exceptions."
Bebop
's in-game

-
"It would disappoint Ms. Shelly!"
Bebop

"I'm not interested in killing people for money."

"Your master is sick?"

"My mother. Not my master."

"Ah ben super, maintenant je suis coincé avec un bourgeois."
Bebop
And
Yamato Conversation 1
-
"だろ奴が噂の殺戮マシーンか?"
-
"Er, apologies. I don't speak Japanese."
Bebop
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Drifter):
"What do I look like, Drifter, a frail organic?"
Bebop
And
Seven Conversation 2
-
"You're not like the other organics."
Bebop
And
Viscous Conversation 1
-
"Do you think she'd like being in a Cube?"
-
"Y'know what? She might! After the ritual, come over and say hi! I'll make biscuits."

Calico.description: Calico is a Hero in Deadlock , a former monster hunter turned hired assassin. Possessing her cat, Ava, Calico uses the shadows to her advantage to surprise her foes, slinging Gloom Bombs and attacking with a Leaping Slash for damage and healing. By Returning to the Shadows, she can turn any fight to her advantage, disappearing after a fight or engaging again when the enemy least expects her.
Calico.lore:
“
Once a decorated member of The Baxter Society, Calico left the august order once she realized that killing monsters for free was less profitable than killing people for money.
Now an in demand contract killer, Calico is living her best life ending someone else's.
Calico has been an assassin for at least 5 years, as she was hired to kill
Pocket
5 years before the events of the ritual.
Pocket survived the assassination attempt due Calico's bullet missing their heart.
It's implied that this failed assassination earned Calico a reputation for "sloppy work" amongst other assassins.
Calico is nicknamed as "the most dangerous woman on the planet".
She's currently being hunted by the International Police,
Scotland Yard,
and the
OSIC
.
She once assassinated someone named "Siegfried" under
Mirage
's nose.
Calico's motivation in the ritual is vague, but she seems to want to be the "Apex Predator" by wishing for power and protection.
Ava
is Calico's cat
familiar
.
Calico adores Ava and refers to herself as "mummy" when talking to Ava.
Calico has knowledge about
the Deep
,
the
Troubadour
,
and
Oathkeeper
.
She's implied to know something about
Victor
's origins.
Calico learned Return To Shadows while she was in the
Baxter Society
.
Calico has a son.
Pocket
's background:
"Arin Fairfax, the eldest heir to Fairfax Industries, has been living in hiding for the past 5 years after being shot and left for dead on their 18th birthday."
Pocket and Calico conversations
Calico
And
Vyper Conversation 2
-
"Word on the street is that you do sloppy work."
-
"Excuse me?"
-
"There was something about... like a hit, that went bad? I don't remember all the details, honestly, Wisconsin hooch is top-shelf."
Holliday
's in-game
voice line
(killed Calico) -
"'Most dangerous woman on the planet', my ass!"
Yamato
's in-game
voice line

"Ha! This is "the most dangerous woman on the planet"?"
Calico
's in-game
voice line
(upgrade Return To Shadows):
"If Interpol hasn't caught me, what chance do they have?"
Calico
's in-game

Haze

's in-game
voice line
(Calico start):
"Your past will catch up with you eventually, Calico. But if you complete the ritual, Mother can prevent that from happening."
Calico
And

And

"You ever hear of something called "The Troubadour"?"
-
"Enough to know to stay away from it."

's in-game

"Only a fool would make a deal with Oathkeeper."

And

Grey Talon.description: Grey Talon is a Hero in Deadlock . He is a clever, long-range combatant that uses his powerful bow in combination with traps and mystical flight to pin down and destroy his foes. With the ability to charge his arrow shot for powerful effect, Grey Talon can harry his foes at a distance before launching a guided Spirit Owl to finish them off.
Grey Talon.lore:
“
A founding member of "The Baxter Society", Wesley Grey Talon spent close to 40 years hunting monsters that preyed on man before finally deciding to find a replacement and lay down his bow. Grey Talon's duties had meant that he never spent much time with his wife and kid, and now that his son had started a family of his own he realized that this was his last chance to reconnect with the people he loved.
Retirement suited Wesley.  He made up for lost time with his wife.  He doted on his grandkids.  He cooked dinner for the whole family every Wednesday.  He was happy.
Then he got the call.
The authorities claimed that it was a freak accident... that the fire consumed his son's house before anyone got a chance to escape.  But Wesley knew better.  His son's wife was an Ixian who could snuff out flame with a thought.  If their bodies were found burned they had to be dead long before there was a fire.
And so Grey Talon has picked up his bow once more, and when he finds who's responsible there will be a bloody reckoning.
Grey Talon's motivation in the ritual is to bring retribution to the
Friends of Humanity
, an extremist neopolitical group who he believes are behind the murder of his family.
Grey Talon is known to be dangerous, having the most confirmed kills out of everyone in the
Baxter Society
.
Grey Talon's talents and commitment to the society earned him a reputation as a "legend".
Even though Grey Talon is retired, the Baxter Society still heavily respects him.
Grey Talon's spirit owl is named Rohan.
His son was named Nathan.
It's implied that Grey Talon's wife is still alive and wouldn't approve of his quest for revenge.
Grey Talon has visited
South Ixia
and said it was "beautiful".
Grey Talon was handsome in his younger years.
Grey Talon
's in-game
voice line
(high killstreak):
"The death I bring today is nothing compared to what lies in store for Hathorne!"
Grey Talon and Mo & Krill conversation 1
-
Krill
:
"You're the man making life hell for the Friends of Humanity, yes?"
-
Grey Talon
:
"I am." -
Krill
:
"Thank you."
Archmother
's in-game
voice line
(Grey Talon start):
"Hathorne's disciples will answer for their crimes. Together, we will make them suffer in ways unimaginable!"
Grey Talon
And
Wraith Conversation 2
Grey Talon
And
Paige Conversation 2
Grey Talon
And
Viscous Conversation 2
-
"[Sigh]... Bring (The Baxter Society) my bow. They'll listen to what you have to say."
Grey Talon
's in-game
voice line
(ping Guided Owl ready) -
"Rohan is ready to hunt!"
Grey Talon
And
Haze Conversation 1
-
"Been a while, Wesley. (...) I'm sorry about Nathan."
-
"Thank you. We... We got your card."
Grey Talon
And
The Doorman Conversation 1
-
"I'm excited to get a front-row seat to you throwing your life away for revenge."
-
"It's not throwing it away if they die."
-
"I'm sure your wife will see it the same way."
Grey Talon
And
Dynamo Conversation 3
-
"Have you been to Ixia, Professor?"
-
"I won't lie: After what happened to my body, I decided to stay clear of Astral Gates. But I hear that South Ixia is beautiful."
-
"It is."
Lady Geist
's in-game
voice line
(killed Talon) -
"I remember when he was handsome."

Mo & Krill.description: Mo & Krill are Heroes in Deadlock . Fighting together, they are a disruptive and mobile pair that can burrow around the battlefield and leave their enemies in ruins. Beginning encounters with Burrow can let Mo & Krill pop out on unsuspecting enemies, attacking them with Scorn to damage and Sand Blast to disarm them. With the support of their team, they can Combo one targeted enemy to pin their target in place while the rest of their allies unleash their attacks.
Mo & Krill.lore:
“
Mo and Krill are members of The Tunnel Rats, a group that help facilitate illicit trade and commerce between the boroughs thanks to a network of underground tunnels.  But while most denizens of the New York underworld respect the work The Rats do, every once in a while a gang tries to exploit the tunnel system for personal vendettas...that's when Mo and Krill step in and remind the city what happens to those who disrespect their hospitality.
Mo & Krill's motivation in the ritual is to achieve the respect and glory they believe is owed to them.
Mo is a
mole man
.
Krill's species is currently unknown, but he has monkey-like characteristics. He also seems to have fur.
Mo's full name is Maurice.
Krill and
Pocket
also call him "Momo".
Mo knows how to speak, but doesn't speak around people he's unfamiliar with.
Mo is learning pottery and wants to audit pottery classes at Columbia University,
although it's implied that he doesn't know to use a pottery wheel.
Mo stinks.
Krill is an author and is writing a memoir about his and Mo's adventures, which currently has 31 chapters.
Krill has bathed in sewer sludge.
Mo and Krill have been forced to live in the margins of society.
It's unknown how the two met, but Krill mentions that their friendship was forged from "respect and certain death".
Mo & Krill value their independence.
They're friends with
Wraith

Mendoza Syndicate

They also don't like it when their names get mixed up.

Ixian

They also offer information for a "reasonable price",
and accept money to dig new underground tunnels.

Mo & Krill don't pay taxes.

Shiv.description: Shiv is a Hero in Deadlock . He is a monster hunter with a cause, conducting hit-and-run attacks and picking off vulnerable targets. Flinging Serrated Knives to bleed his targets from range, Shiv builds his Rage through damage and dashes up to his enemy with a Slice and Dice flurry of blades and a few powerful shotgun blasts. Withstanding grievous damage via Bloodletting, Shiv hunts down any dying targets to finish them off with a devastating Killing Blow.
Shiv.lore:
“
A loyal member of "The Baxter Society", an international order of monster hunters, Shiv travels across North America looking to put down creatures that prey on the living.
While his less polished nature and criminal past make some of the more traditional members of the Society wary, no one can deny his effectiveness.
Shiv is fighting in the ritual on behalf of the
Baxter Society
.
His wish is unknown, but Shiv's motivation is to prove his worth to
Grey Talon
and the Baxter Society.
Not much is known about Shiv's criminal past from before he joined the Baxter Society.
The Hidden King
calls Shiv's past "bloody",
and the
Venators of St. Benedict
are keeping an eye on Shiv in case he strays from the path of redemption.
Shiv's claims that the Baxter Society "saved his life",
and his change of heart seems to be genuine.
Shiv was chosen by Grey Talon as his replacement in the Baxter Society.
He has been in the Society for "a few years" and says he is not respected by the other members.
Shiv worries that the Baxter Society would eventually turn on him,
as they still doubt that he's changed from his past.
It's implied that Shiv feels lonely.
Shiv likes to go bowling and drink
bourbon
.
He is also referred to as a biker.
Shiv hates cats.
Shiv allegedly "took something that doesn't belong to him".

Ivy.description: Ivy is a Hero in Deadlock . She is a gargoyle-turned-vigilante with potent supportive and disruptive abilities to assist her allies in combat. After setting up a Kudzu Connection with an ally to share healing and buffs, she can summon patches of Entangling Thorns and transform into her Stone Form to damage and stun the enemy while healing herself. With her abilities of flight, she can pick up any ally or bomb and fly them to any point on the battlefield, choosing to either explosively Air Drop them into the middle of the enemy battle group, or rescue an ally from danger.
Ivy.lore:
“
The gargoyle didn't know what was happening when it sprang to life...  just that a big human and a small human were being hurt.  And so the gargoyle leapt to action, sending the attackers fleeing in horror.  The small human said thank you and asked the gargoyle's name.  The gargoyle didn't have one.  And so the small human said, "I'm going to call you Ivy."  The gargoyle, being covered in ivy at the time, thought it was a bit obvious, but decided to go along with it for the small human's sake.
The humans asked if Ivy would come home with them so they could show their appreciation, and so Ivy walked with them.  That night she learned much.  The family were called The Arroyo's.  The little one, Sophia.  Mofongo is what they called a plate of deliciousness.  But most importantly, she learned that the people attacking them were called "The Mendoza Syndicate", and they were hurting people...nice people like The Arroyo's.
18 years have passed since the day the Arroyo's took Ivy home... and during that time she made it her mission to dismantle the Mendoza Syndicate and free Spanish Harlem from its grasp.  However the thing about dedicating your life to a single pursuit for nearly 2 decades is that you don't really know what to do once you achieve it.  For the first time in her life, Ivy is prepared to venture outside of Spanish Harlem and see what the world has to offer beyond vigilante justice.
Ivy has a few motivations for being in the ritual. She wants to keep
Spanish Harlem
safe,
make life better for the
Arroyo's
,
find her new purpose in life now that the
Mendoza Syndicate
has been dismantled,
help
Carlos Arroyo
secure his place as New York's mayor,
and (if she finds out about
Sophia
's job as
Wraith
's bookmaker)
keep Sophia out of trouble.
Ivy's visual novel
will show her efforts to get a job and support the Arroyos.
Ivy's sister,
Sophia Arroyo
(or Sophie), is studying at university under
Dynamo
,
and works with
Wraith
to pay for her tuition.
Carlos Arroyo
is a 1st-grade teacher
who's running an election campaign for mayor of
New York City
.
Carlos' wife is named
Maria
.
Ivy also has a little brother named
Manny
,
who's a fan of
Kelvin
.
The Arroyos are implied to be Catholic.
Ivy is reluctant to leave the Arroyos on their own for too long.
This could be due to the fear that the Arroyo's will be hurt if she's away from them for too long.
Ivy has been alive for 20 years.
She doesn't know who created her, but she doesn't care since "her life started when she met the Arroyos".
Ivy has only recently started leaving Spanish Harlem, and is looking forward to sightseeing.
She wants to watch
South Pacific
.
Ivy is referred to as "the savior of Spanish Harlem",
but she doesn't like the nickname.
Ivy's efforts to save Spanish Harlem were reported by news in Illinois, due to public interest.

Warden.description: Warden is a Hero in Deadlock . He is a tough, tenacious brawler with a technique for alchemy and fighting the supernatural. Opening fights with either a Binding Word or a disrupting Alchemical Flask, Warden dashes into the fight to brawl at close range and utilizing his Willpower for protection and staying power. In desperate situations, Warden can trigger his Last Stand, damaging and stealing life from all foes in front of him.
Warden.lore:
“
Most people think the supernatural came into the world 50 years ago.  They’re wrong.  Its presence shaped folklore for generations… and as long as there have been people afraid of the shadows, there have been those who dedicated their lives to fighting in them.
Coming from a lineage of militant alchemists, Warden’s family always trained for the day they would have to stave off a mystic apocalypse… but as time passed the importance of the lessons seemed less and less important.  What once was viewed as a sincere warning slowly morphed into being perceived as amusing anecdotes told by their superstitious grandparents.
When the portal opened in Central Park, Warden’s parents realized not only was everything they were told was true, they were unprepared.  Refusing to let the next generation fall asleep on the job, Warden was trained since birth to be a supernatural killing machine with one purpose: stopping the Patrons from ever entering our world.
Warden hides his true motives from the
Patrons
, despite their telepathic abilities.
As such, the Patrons likely don't know that Warden is working against their goals, although
The Archmother
seems to know that Warden hates her.
How Warden intends to stop the Patrons is currently unknown, although Warden expresses that he "only gets one shot at this",
and is willing to die if it means completing his mission.
Warden views his battle with the Patrons as a war.
Warden is implied to have trouble trusting people.
He seems to hide his motivations from his allies, based on his conversation with
Holliday
.
Although Warden is committed to protecting humanity at all costs, he does not discriminate against supernatural creatures, instead treating characters like
Abrams
and
Ivy
with respect.
Warden has no hobbies outside of his training.
Due to training his entire life,
Warden never got to live a normal childhood.
It's implied that he dreams of playing catch.
Warden is said to be a vigilante,
although his feats are currently unknown. Warden mentions that New York is under his protection.
It's implied that Warden's militant alchemist bloodline comes from his father's side.

"Warden, you are inscrutable."
