Yamato.description: Yamato (real name Kaori ) is a Hero in Deadlock . She is a close-range assassin using precise strikes and sword attacks to destroy her foes. Conducting a Flying Strike with her grapple to get close, Yamato unleashes her powerful melee attacks along with Power Slash and Crimson Slash attacks to damage, slow, and disable her enemies while healing herself. Once fully engaged, she can unleash her Shadow Transformation to become infused with her brother's shadow soul, becoming unstoppable for a short time while ending the life of her opponents.
Yamato.lore:
“
犯罪組織のボスの家に生まれた花桜梨とその兄の大和にとって、
父の死後に「セブンスムーン」の跡目を継ぐのは自明のことでもあった。
そして何年もの間、かれらは対等の立場で組織を率いて利益と成功を
もたらし、やがてはアメリカへの進出をも目論むようになった。
思い描いていた計画は単純で、 大和がアメリカに渡って花桜梨の
国際的な存在感を高め、その間花桜梨は日本に残って国内を統制する、
といったものだった。 兄妹にとって不運だったのは、花桜梨が日本で
指揮をとるという計画を快く思わない部下たちがいたことだった。
そして迅速かつ暴力的な形で、反乱は発生した。大和は花桜梨を
守るために命を落とし、花桜梨と数人の忠実な部下たちは、
その大和の犠牲のおかげもあって、日本からアメリカへと
逃げ延びることに成功した。
アメリカに着いた花桜梨たちを出迎えたのは、本来であれば大和が
会う予定となっていた男であった。彼は日本人の名前になじみが
なかったため性別の区別がついておらず、花桜梨のことを
「ヤマト」と呼んだ。花桜梨は男の間違いを正そうと思ったが、
結局そのままにした。兄の記憶を残し続けるためにも、その名を名乗り、
その夢を受け継ぐことが最善の道であろうと考えたからだ。
“
Born to criminal royalty, Kaori and her brother Yamato always knew they were destined to run The 7th Moon after their father's passing.  For years they ran the organization as equals; leading to profit, success, and plans for expansion to the United States.
The idea was simple.  Kaori would stay in Japan and maintain things at home, while Yamato would travel to America to set up an international presence.  Unfortunately for the siblings; this plan didn't sit well with some of their more insecure underlings, who bristled at the idea of being led by Kaori in Japan.
The coup was swift and violent.  Yamato gave his life protecting Kaori, but in doing so ensured that she and a handful of loyalists were able to escape Japan for America.
When she arrived stateside, the contact her brother was supposed to meet greeted her and her retinue.  Unfamiliar with the gender of Japanese names, the man addressed her as Yamato.  She thought to correct him, but decided that the best way to keep her brother's memory alive was to take his name and live out his dream.
—
A FATE'S TALE
Yamato's wish in the ritual is to make the
Seventh Moon
powerful enough to take over New York.
She also hopes to solidify her brother's legacy, as she is still grieving his death.
Yamato predominantly speaks Japanese, although she also knows how to speak English.
Yamato is the ruthless leader of the Seventh Moon, and leads the organization by example.
She once murdered someone for owing the Seventh Moon a "C-Note" ($100).
She often attempts to threaten her teammates to get them to obey her.
The sword Yamato uses is an ancient heirloom.
She inherited it when her predecessor died, and someone else will inherit it when she dies.
Yamato wants to make the
OSIC
and
Nashala
obey her.
Yamato has arrived in
New York
less than a year before the
Ritual
.
Yamato wants to speak to someone named "Molly Molenzo", a woman incarcerated at
Rikers Island
who got stabbed by
Vyper
.
Yamato
's in-game
voice line
(Select):
"New York will fall into the hands of the Seventh Moon."
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Yamato Start):
"This is not your city, Yamato, but after you summon the Hidden King... it will be."
Archmother
's in-game
voice line
(Yamato Start):
"You have overcome grief and betrayal to stand here today. But you seek to do more than just survive. Complete the ritual."
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Yamato Start):
"Kaori, you honor your brother by taking his name, and honor him further still by making his dreams a reality. Complete the ritual, and see the success you both dreamed of."
Yamato
's in-game
voice line
(Select):
"I will lead my team to victory!"
Yamato
's in-game
voice line
(Select):
"Follow me! I'll lead you to victory."
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
(Select) -
"I know a guy who owed the Seventh Moon a C-note... well, I knew a guy who owed the Seventh Moon a C-Note... Yamato murdered the shit out of him."
Yamato
And
Holliday Conversation 2
-
"What did you say about Murphy?"
-
"Don't worry, sheriff. Play your part and he lives."
Yamato
And
Mo & Krill Conversation 1
Yamato
And
McGinnis Conversation 2
Yamato
And
Dynamo Conversation 3
Yamato
's in-game
voice line
(Select):
"If I die, someone else will inherit this sword. Just as I did."
Yamato
And
Haze Conversation 1
-
"I don't take orders from the Seventh Moon."
-
"Not yet."
Yamato
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Mirage):
"Maybe I'll make Nashala my servant."
Shopkeeper
's in-game
voice line
(buys festive T4 item) -
"Hope you enjoy your first Christmas in New York."
Yamato
And
Vyper Conversation 3
-
"You did time on Rikers, yes? (...) So, you must know Molly Molenzo. It's very important I speak to her."
Vyper
And
Wraith Conversation 1
-
"Heard you shanked Molly. (...) She's not [a friend]."
-
"Cool, yeah. No, I stabbed the hell outta her. Not a fan."

Lash.description: Lash is a Hero in Deadlock . He is a brutal bruiser of a Hero, eagerly initiating fights and chasing down fleeing opponents. He leaps into combat with his Grappling hook, Flogging his foes with a life-stealing whip and stomping the ground with a Ground Strike that damages multiple targets. If the enemy team groups up, Lash can pick them all up at once and Death Slam them into the ground.
Lash.lore:
“
Jacob Lash is an asshole.
Lash's wish and motives in the ritual are currently unknown. He does, however, know exactly what he wants from the
Patrons
.
Lash is a champion of the
Bear Pit
, an underground arena of blood sport where spectators gamble on matches.
Lash refers to himself as "The Lash".
He also calls himself "The God of Combat" and "God's gift to Combat".
Lash donates 3% of his earnings to his charity called "Lash-Back", dedicated to children "that kind of suck".
Lash likes to drink mimosas,
a cocktail made with chilled sparkling wine and orange juice. He has an open tab at
Jezebel's
.
Lash is referred to by others as a "
stevedore
" (dockworker).
He also has anchor tattoos on his shoulders, and his
Death Slam
ability has
ship horn sound effects
.
Lash has not gone to college.
Lash
's in-game
voice line
(Select):
"Oh, I'll summon the Patrons. And when I do, I know exactly what I'm wishing for."
Lash
And
Victor Conversation 1
-
"You should fight in the bear pit."
-
"I'm not into getting mauled by grizzlies."
-
"It's not a literal bear pit. It's a fight club where the winner gets the honor of losing to me."
Lash
And
Seven Conversation 3
-
"You're the pitfighter, yes?"
-
"Uh... You mispronounced "champion"."
Lash
's in-game
voice line
(use Grapple):
"Here comes The Lash!"
Lash
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Paige):
"Don't be hard on yourself. Everyone loses to The Lash."
Lash
And
Lady Geist Conversation 2
-
"Tell me you're competent."
-
"Competent? No, I am god's gift to combat."
Lash
's in-game
voice line
(Ping Pre-Game):
"I hope you're all ready to watch the god of combat do his thing."
Lash
's in-game
voice line
-
"You know it's important to give back. That's why I'm taking three percent of my earnings a day and donating them to Lash Back. It's my charity dedicated to children who kinda suck."
Lash
's in-game
voice line
-
"Eh, you know, I probably shouldn't have had those six Mimosas before the fight."
Infernus
' in-game
voice line
-
"Don't die before you close your tab, Lash!"
Mo & Krill
's in-game
voice line
-
"Oh, look. A stevedore!"
The Doorman
's in-game
voice line
-
"Oh look, a stevedore with delusions of grandeur."
Lady Geist
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Lash):
"I won't be bullied by a stevedore."
Lash
's in-game
voice line
-
"And this is why I never bothered with college!"

Viscous.description: Viscous is a Hero in Deadlock . He is a vexing opponent with versatile goo abilities, a psychic sea anemone with an ectoplasmic goo body. He can Splatter his foes with a large ball of goo and Puddle Punch both allies and enemies to knock them around, while encasing himself or allies in a Cube of goo for protection. For maximum disruption, Viscous can morph into a large Goo Ball and bounce off of walls and enemies alike.
Viscous.lore:
“
The Bermuda Triangle was never a myth, it was a shadowline nexus deep underneath the Atlantic Ocean.  For the most part, the things that escaped this astral gate were benign (like Nessie), but now something dark and predatory known only as The Adversary hunts the seas... and ocean denizens are scared to death.
One of those inhabitants, a psychic sea anemone, wants to do something about it.  Summoning an ectoplasmic goo body to traverse the surface, Viscous is desperately trying to summon the Patrons in order to keep The Deep safe from the horror that lurks below.
Viscous hoped his goo body would cause surface-dwellers to take the Deep's problems seriously.
Viscous is commonly referred to as a "tourist".
While on the surface, Viscous wants to watch
South Pacific
,
free his "brothers" from New York's aquariums,
try climbing some stairs in his goo body,
and visit a variety of locations in New York, including Staten Island, Long Island, New Jersey and Secaucus.
Viscous likes people-watching.
Viscous can't read.
"The Cube" is a protoplasmic cube.
The Cube nullifies all pain, even for characters like
Victor
.
Viscous doesn't question how the Cube works, even when it can heal non-organic bodies like
Bebop
's.
Viscous spends time in the Cube whenever he feels sad.
Viscous
' in-game
voice line
(Select):
"I was hoping that this suit would make people take the problems of the Deep seriously. I'm not sure it's working."
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Viscous):
"I swear to God, that is the first tourist I have legitimate guilt about killing."
Mina
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Viscous):
"Tourists..."
Victor
's in-game
voice lines
(Killed Viscous):
"This isn't the place for tourists."
Viscous
' in-game
voice line
(Killed Holliday):
"I hate fighting a fellow tourist."
Viscous
' in-game
voice line
(Unselect):
"The Patrons can wait. I want to see South Pacific."
Viscous
' in-game
voice line
(Unselect):
"I'm going to go free my brothers from the prison known as "The Aquarium"."
Viscous
' in-game
voice line
(Unselect):
"I was planning on trying to use stairs today anyway."
Viscous
' in-game
voice line
(Unselect)
Viscous
And
Infernus Conversation 2
-
"How you liking New York?"
-
"People-watching is fun!"
-
"You should stop by Jezebel's sometime. If you like people watching, you'll see all types there."
Viscous
And
Abrams Conversation 3
-
"I can't read!"
Viscous
' in-game
voice line
(Unselect):
"When you need to be trapped in a protoplasmic cube, you're going to be thinking, "man, I wish I had Viscous' help. He seems like a nice person who would trap me in a protoplasmic cube"."
Victor
's in-game
voice line
(Clutch Cube):
"I... I don't feel pain!"
Viscous
And
Bebop Conversation 2
-
"Hey, Viscous! I'm not organic. Why does the cube heal me?"
-
"We don't question the cube."
Viscous
And
Grey Talon Conversation 1
-
"Do you want to spend time in the cube? It's where I go when I'm sad. Or injured. Or just want to be in the cube."

Pocket.description: Pocket is a Hero in Deadlock . With a powerful shotgun and highly mobile abilities, they thrive in close encounters. Channelling their magic briefcase to Barrage groups of enemies with spiritual bursts, Pocket may use their sentient cloak to teleport beside their targets and unload their shotgun; disappearing inside their Enchanter's Satchel to avoid return fire. In larger groups, they can unleash an Affliction to slowly eat away at their health, setting their enemies up for a devastating attack.
Pocket.lore:
“
Arin Fairfax, the eldest heir to Fairfax Industries, has been living in hiding for the past 5 years after being shot and left for dead on their 18th birthday.  Arin doesn't know who is trying to keep them from taking control of their parent's company... but in the avarice fueled viper's nest that is Fairfax Industries it could be anyone.
Taking on the name "Pocket", Arin desperately wants to keep their true identity a secret… not only for their own protection; but because they want to forge their own identity separate from their parents.
Walter Fairfax statue
Pocket's motivation in the ritual is to stop their father,
Maximilian Fairfax
,
and to take control of
Fairfax Industries
.
Pocket believes their father was behind their attempted assasination.
Pocket wants to stop their father rather than kill him.
Maximilian seems to know that Pocket survived, as in
The Binding of Oathkeeper
, he asks
Lady Geist
if she knows where Pocket is.
Pocket also does not trust their mother.
Calico
was the assassin hired to kill Pocket, who survived because the bullet missed their heart.
It's implied that Enchanter's Satchel also helped Pocket survive.
Some time after the assassination, Pocket left New York before returning to participate in the ritual.
Pocket was betrothed to
Mina
, implied to be due to an arranged marriage.
Pocket's magical suitcase, while powerful, was never meant to be used as a weapon.
Pocket is trying to keep their suitcase away from Maximilian.
Pocket expresses regret for killing most of their enemies and say they only chose violence as a last resort.
Pocket likely has at least one younger sibling, as their background calls them the "eldest heir" to Fairfax Industries.
A statue of Walter Fairfax, presumably an ancestor of Pocket, can be found in the garden behind the
Baroness Hotel
. Walter is depicted as an old man with frogs crawling over his legs. The statue also appears in Pocket's background in the hero select screen.
Pocket went to
Blackmore Academy
.
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Pocket start):
"You've overcome much, Pocket, but to stop your father you'll need more power than you could imagine. Summon the Hidden King, and let him help you."
Pocket
's in-game
voice line
(select):
"I think the worst part is that... my father would be more proud of me if I was trying to kill him rather than trying to stop him."
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Pocket start):
"Only you can change Fairfax Industries for the better, Pocket. Complete the ritual and make the world a safer place."
Pocket
's in-game
voice line
-
"I am the rightful heir of Fairfax Industries and it will be mine."
Pocket
's in-game
voice line
-
"My father's gift for my 18th birthday was a bullet to the chest. Today is my chance to say 'thank you'."
The Binding of Oathkeeper
-
Chapter 5B
Pocket and Bebop conversation
Pocket and Calico conversations
Pocket
's in-game
voice line
(upgrade Enchanter's Satchel):
"It saved my life before, and it will do it again."
Pocket
's in-game
voice line
(upgrade Enchanter's Satchel):
"This is how I stayed alive all these years."
Pocket
's in-game
voice line
(pre-game ping):
"New York got a lot more intense than I remembered."
The Doorman
's in-game
voice line
(killed Pocket):
"Pocket, you were doomed the moment you returned to New York."
Mina
's in-game
voice line
(killed Pocket) -
"I should have been a Fairfax."
Mina
's in-game
voice line
(killed Pocket) -
"You ruined my life."
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Mina start):
"You may not be a Fairfax, but you are something greater. You are Mina Ha! The woman who heralds the Hidden King's arrival to this plane!"
Pocket
's in-game
voice line
(upgrade Barrage):
"This was never supposed to be a weapon."
Pocket
's in-game
voice line
-
"I'll do whatever it takes to keep this case from my father."
Pocket
's in-game
voice line
-
"There has to be a better way than violence."
Pocket
's in-game
voice line
-
"Please give up, don't make me kill you."
Pocket
And
Apollo Conversation 2
-
"You went to Blackmore? (...) Sounds like you miss it."

Mirage.description: Mirage is a Hero in Deadlock . He is agile and uses powerful wind-based abilities for disruption. By throwing out Fire Scarabs and transforming into a Dust Devil, Mirage can damage, lift up, steal life and elude his targets while applying Djinn's Mark to enemies to enhance his attacks. When the time is right, he can Travel across the map in an instant to assist his allies, hunt down weak foes and take care of objectives.
Mirage.lore:
“
The Djinn are one of the more curious groups of people in the modern world.  Possessing great power in controlled doses, Djinn are incapable of maintaining corporeal form for longer than 48 minutes without resting within a vessel.  As a result, most Djinn employ human bodyguards for transport, protection, and companionship.
Mirage is one such bodyguard.  Employed by Djinn ambassador Nashala Dion, Mirage is in New York on a diplomatic mission.  It's the hope of the Djinn that they can negotiate with the US government for a sale of part of Wyoming so that they can build a sovereign nation for their people.
Mirage's wish (which is moreso
Nashala
's wish) is to help Nashala buy a piece of Wyoming to turn into a home for the Djinn,
although he believes that Nashala doesn't need a wish to pull off the deal,
since the Djinn can offer America money and power.
Mirage has worked for Nashala for a few years, after she approached him with a job offer.
Mirage is deeply loyal to Nashala and the Djinn's plight,
willing to die and kill for her.
While Mirage enjoys Nashala's company, he can find her frustrating to work with when she makes "impulsive, short-sighted" decisions (such as asking him to trust
Seven
).
Mirage fights with Nashala by his side since he believes that's the safest place for her.
Anyone who wants to talk to Nashala must have Mirage's approval,
and anyone trying to steal or harm Nashala will be killed by Mirage.
Mirage and Nashala haven't had the chance to do much sightseeing, but are looking forward to seeing various locales,
such as New Jersey and Columbia University.
Mirage has visited New York's Public Library.
Mirage wants to try eating a hot dog.
Mirage views the Djinn as "people". He thinks some are "fascinating", but some others are "assholes".
Mirage dislikes the
Paradox Organisation
, since they keep trying to steal Nashala for the
Paradox Museum
.
While in New York, Mirage and Nashala are guests at the
Baroness Hotel
.
Mirage likes to play bowling and calls it "the sport of kings". He learned it in England.
Mirage
's in-game
voice line
(Select):
"I will play my part, and in doing so build a home for the Djinn."
Mirage
's in-game
voice line
(Killstreak):
"Soon, Wyoming will be ours!"
Patrons
in-game
voice line
(Mirage Start):
"The Djinn deserve to have a place to call their own, but birthing a nation is not easy. Summon me and let me help you."
Mirage
And
Kelvin Conversation 1
-
"Do you think Nashala has a chance at brokering a deal?"
-
"If there's anyone that can pull it off, it will be her."
Mirage
And
Holliday Conversation 1
-
"You... really think the US is gonna sell Wyoming to the Djinn."
-
"Well, I think the US is interested in money... and power. And the Djinn can offer both."
Mirage
And
Abrams Conversation 3
-
"A few years. (...) One doesn't send out a CV to work for the Djinn, they... approach you, with an offer."
Mirage
And
Lady Geist Conversation 3
-
"Good help is hard to find. Nashala is lucky to have you."
-
"It's an honor to serve her."
-
"Oh, I like you."
Mirage
's in-game
voice line
(use Djinn's Mark (low)):
"I won't fail the Djinn!"
Mirage
's in-game
voice line
(Killstreak):
"I'm willing to die for Nashala-- and I am certainly willing to kill for her."
Mirage
And
Seven Conversation 3
Mirage
And
Bebop Conversation 1
-
"Then why are you taking (Nashala) into a fight?"
-
"What would you have me do? Stick her in a dresser at her hotel? No. She's safer with me."
Mirage
And
Lady Geist Conversation 2
Mirage
And
Vyper Conversation 2
-
"What d'ya say I throw her (Nashala) into the Hudson, so we can run off together? Ha..."
-
"Do not touch her if you value your life."
Mirage
And
Drifter Conversation 3
-
"What happens if I break that fancy bottle of yours?"
-
"I kill you."
Mirage
And
Calico Conversation 2
-
"I haven't had the chance to see much, but... what I have has been pleasant."
Mirage
And
Dynamo Conversation 3
-
"Which is your favorite part of New York you've seen?"
-
"We haven't had the opportunity to do much sightseeing. But the library was stunning."
Mirage
's in-game
voice line
(Unselect):
"I can't. I'm supposed to take Nashala on a tour of New Jersey."
Mirage
And
Dynamo Conversation 2
-
"Professor, would you be willing to give Nashala and I a tour of Columbia?"
-
"It would be my pleasure."
Mirage
's in-game
voice line
(Unselect):
"Fate has other plans for me today. Today... I try a hot-dog."
Mirage
And
Dynamo Conversation 1
Mirage
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Paradox):
"Nashala won't end up in one of your museums, Paradox."
Mirage
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Paradox):
"When will Paradox learn?"
Paradox
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Mirage):
"That bottle is going to look so pretty in the Paradox Museum."
Mirage
's in-game
voice line
(killed the Doorman) -
"Until today, our stay at the Baroness has been rather pleasant."
Mirage
's in-game
voice line
(killed the Doorman) -
"Nashala will be disappointed that we need to check out of the Baroness."
Mirage
And
Holliday Conversation 3
-
"I do. When she's free of her vessel, she offers... scintillating conversation. When she rests... I get to go bowling."
-
"Bowling?"
-
"I learned about it in England, it is the sport of kings."

Vyper.description: Vyper is a Hero in Deadlock . After Slithering across the battlefield to swiftly avoid enemy attacks while spraying them with copious amount of bullets, Vyper can inject retreating foes with Lethal Venom to finish them off and use her Screwjab Dagger to hit faraway targets. By slinging her Petrifying Bolas, Vyper will make sure that her targets won't get away from her.
Vyper.lore:
“
When it comes to breaking the law, not getting caught is a pretty important part of the job.  Vyper never got that memo.  Luckily for her, if there’s one thing she’s better at than being arrested, it’s escaping out of jail.
Having done time in every major prison in the tri-state area, Vyper has built an impressive network of street level lowlifes that owe her one.  She’s also built an impressive network of street level lowlifes that want her dead, but she tries to focus on the positive.
Vyper's wish seems to be a new and secure life for herself.
Vyper is a gorgon.
She often refers to herself as "V".
Vyper has been to New Jersey,
Staten Island,
Philadelphia,
Illinois,
Oklahoma
and Wisconsin.
Vyper used to work for the
Mendoza Syndicate
, acting as
Infernus
' replacement.
When working for Mendoza, Vyper was caught by
Ivy
and tried for 13 counts of murder, although Vyper mentions that the actual kill count was way higher.
Vyper has killed tourists in the past and felt no remorse for doing so.
Vyper has been kicked out of the
Paradox Museum
and the
Baroness Hotel
.
She's also been barred from
Jezebel's
.
Vyper once crashed Fashion Week.
Vyper makes references to
pruno
, an improvised alcoholic beverage also known as "prison wine".
Vyper says her mother was "slinging poison" after she found out about a life insurance policy, implying that she murdered her spouse for the insurance.
Similarly, Vyper wants to get married to a rich husband and kill him for the inheritance.
Vyper has a Midwest accent, according to
Mina
.
Archmother
's in-game
voice line
(Vyper Start):
"You slink from shadow to shadow, Vyper, longing for security that always eludes you, but if you complete the ritual, you will find what you seek."
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Vyper Start):
"Vyper, the cycle can be broken. A new life awaits you once you've completed the ritual!"
Archmother
's in-game
voice line
(Vyper Start):
"The life you've longed for is not a fantasy, it could be yours! But first, you need to summon the Archmother."
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
(Upgrade Petrifying Bola):
"Gorgon's gonna gorgon! You know what I'm saying?"
Celeste
's in-game
voice line
(killed Vyper):
"Gorgons are the worst!"
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
(Killstreak):
"Just give up, baby. No one's better than V!
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
(Leave Base):
"V's comin' to save the day, baby!"
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
-
"Learned this trick in Jersey."
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
-
"A Staten Island classic!"
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
-
"You know, they love this in Philly."
Vyper
And
Holliday Conversation 2
-
"Where from?"
-
"Illinois."
-
"No shit! You know, I did a little time in Cook County."
Vyper
And
Drifter Conversation 1
-
"Yeah, it's because they never did time in OKC."
Vyper
And
Calico Conversation 2
-
"You know, when I was in the joint I heard stories about you."
-
"I didn't realise my exploits were things of New Jersey lore."
-
"No, not New Jersey, Wisconsin! There's actually a lot of assassins in Wisconsin."
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Ivy):
""Savior of Spanish Harlem". Man, I could have been the savior of Spanish Harlem... Ha, probably would have had to stop working for Mendoza to do it, but people can change."
Infernus
' in-game
voice line
(Killed Vyper):
"Can't believe Mendoza replaced me with someone like her!"
Ivy
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Vyper):
"I stopped you when you worked for Mendoza, and I'll stop you again!"
Vyper
And
Ivy Conversation 2
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Viscous):
"I swear to God, that is the first tourist I have legitimate guilt about killing."
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
-
"Okay, maybe next time, you guys shouldn't kick me out of the Paradox Museum!"
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
(Killed The Doorman):
"That's for kicking me out of the Baroness."
Infernus
' in-game
voice line
(Killed Vyper):
"There's a reason that lady's not allowed in Jezebel's!"
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Mina):
"Man, you crash Fashion Week one time and the next thing you know the lady plots your death."
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
-
"Ah, whatever. I needed to make pruno anyway."
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
(use Lethal Venom) -
"Have some pruno on the house!"
Vyper
's in-game
voice line
(upgrade Lethal Venom) -
"I'm gonna be slinging more poison than my mom after she found out about the life insurance policy."
Vyper
And
Lady Geist Conversation 3
-
"'Cause I wanna marry into money. Like, wait five years and bump off my husband for the inheritance, 'cause this bird wasn't meant to be in a gilded cage, baby!"
Mina
's in-game
voice line
-
"I hate your stupid face, I hate your stupid attitude, and I hate your stupid Midwest accent."

Sinclair.description: Sinclair are Heroes in Deadlock . With their trusty magic wand, they can shoot unpredictable Bolts to surprise enemies and use magic to turn them into Rabbits. The Spectral Assistant amplifies their damage and can serve as a fast escape route. Sinclair can even turn their enemies' abilities against themselves with their surprising final trick, Audience Participation.
Sinclair.lore:
“
Henry's parents told him he was too young and impulsive to mess with real magic, and so they gave him a deck of cards to play with.  He took to sleight of hand naturally and soon was dazzling his classmates with fantastic feats of illusions that were done without mystic artifacts or incantation.
When he was in high school he met Savannah, and their mutual love of stage magic sparked a whirlwind romance.  Soon they fell in love and created an act together.  Obviously they were meant to be; and so at prom, Henry proposed to Savannah and they married soon after graduation.
Unsurprisingly both sets of parents were not thrilled at this prospect, but Henry and Savannah knew they were soulmates.  And so they cemented their love for one another by having a blood mystic bind their souls for eternity.
When an on-stage accident claimed both their lives, no one was sure who to blame.  Henry claims Savannah was out of position.  Savannah says Henry didn't wait for his cue.  But one thing's for sure, since their souls are tied to each other neither one of them have been able to move on.  Now a bickering pair of ghosts, Henry and Savannah need to work together if they want to have any chance of undoing their eternal union.
Sinclair has two different voices, Henry and Savannah. The character is initially controlled by Henry, then changes to Savannah once Henry dies in-game, and changes back to Henry when Savannah dies. The character who isn't controlling Sinclair plays the Spectral Assistant (though the Assistant currently only has a female model).
Both Henry and Savannah have to agree on who's controlling the body before the ritual.
The body in question is implied to be a wooden mannequin or automaton, rather than an actual organic body that Sinclair is possessing, since their footsteps sound like clanging wood and mechanical whirring while walking or using certain abilities.
Sinclair's stage names are
Henry the Magnificent
and
The Spectacular Savannah.
Both Henry and Savannah believe they are "the responsible one".
"Sinclair" is implied to be Henry and Savannah's surname.
Sinclair
's in-game
voice line
(select):
Henry:
"We'll be ready to help once we agree who's driving the body." -
Savanna:
"I am." -
Henry:
"She's not."
Henry
's in-game
voice line
(use Spectral Assistant):
"Introducing the Spectacular Savannah!"
Savanna
's in-game
voice line
(use Spectral Assistant):
"Introducing the Magnificent Henry!"
Henry
's in-game
voice line
(respawn) -
"It's ok, I'm the responsible one."
Savanna
's in-game
voice line
(respawn) -
"It's ok, I'm the responsible one."
Archmother
's in-game
voice line
(Sinclair healing):
"The Sinclairs tend to their allies."

Mina.description: Mina is a Hero in Deadlock ; a glass cannon that delivers quick bursts of Spirit damage at range with her passive, Love Bites. She can transform into bats and escape when things get a bit too messy. Each time she triggers Love Bites, her vampiric powers grow stronger. This builds toward her ultimate, Nox Nostra, which unleashes a massive swarm of bats that hunt down and silence nearby enemies.
Mina.lore:
“
Mina Ha had it all...rich parents, elite education, and an arranged marriage that would see her ascend from run-of-the-mill upper class to American royalty.  She was happy.
Then her betrothed was assassinated.
Mina wept; not for the life of her fiancé, but for the future that was stolen from her.  Why couldn’t the killer just wait until after the wedding? Then she’d have the last name she always dreamed of and no one would even have to pretend to love anyone.  It could have been perfect, but life wasn’t fair...and so Mina did what she always does when things don’t go her way: she told her parents to fix it.
Mr. And Mrs. Ha knew that the only way to appease their daughter was to offer her something greater than what she lost... and marrying into one of the world’s most lauded families was a tall order to top.  They had to think big.  They had to think outside of the box.  They had to promise their daughter immortality.
It took a small fortune, but eventually they found a vampire who was willing to turn her.  Unsurprisingly, Mina thought the idea of eternal youth and a trust fund was an acceptable plan B and happily agreed to the proposal.  Now a fledgling vampire, Mina is quickly discovering that the clout she held as a human has no weight in vampire high society...and while at first that annoyed her, if there is one thing Mina has a knack for, it's learning the rules so she can subvert them.  She will be the Viscount of New York, the other vampires just don't know it yet.
Mina's fiancé was
Pocket
,
who suffered an assassination attempt by
Calico
5 years before the events of the game.
Mina is a fashion designer and owns a clothing brand.
She knows how to sew.
Mina complains that her parents "botched" her turning into a vampire.
Mina graduated from
Blackmore Academy
.
Mina
's in-game
voice line
(killed Pocket) -
"I should have been a Fairfax."
Mina
's in-game
voice line
(killed Pocket):
"Arin, you're the worst!"
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Mina start):
"You may not be a Fairfax, but you are something greater. You are Mina Ha! The woman who heralds the Hidden King's arrival to this plane!"
Pocket
's background
Pocket
And
Calico Conversation 2
Billy
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Mina) -
"I hope your new clothing line gets panned."
Mina
's in-game
voice line
(Killed M&K) -
"I'm pretty sure those were the guys selling knock-offs of my dresses."
<ref>

's in-game
voice line
-
"I have a whole life to build after my parents botched my turning, so no, I'm not helping you right now. I'm a little busy."
Graves
's in-game
voice line
(killed Mina):
"I hate Blackmore alumni."

Drifter.description: Drifter is a Hero in Deadlock . Something ancient has arrived in New York... a nameless horror known only as the Drifter. Relentless as time, as certain as death, once Drifter sets his eyes on a victim there's nothing they can do to stop him. They can try to run, but his Bloodscent drives him forward, leading him to isolated prey. Even if they manage to escape it doesn't matter, as Stalker's Mark allows Drifter to appear right behind his enemies before lunging in for the kill with a vicious Rend. Soon Eternal Night comes, and a faint whistling in the breeze will be joined by a chorus of screams.
Drifter.lore:
“
An ancient vampire roaming across America, the nameless monstrosity known as The Drifter has been preying on the living for generations.
Unlike most vampires, Drifter doesn’t value finery or titles and has naked contempt for vampiric laws and tradition.  This refusal to toe the line has made him a marked man all over the North American Baronies; but while Viscounts and Elders cry for his execution, Drifter continues to do what he pleases...
Unlike the other heroes, Drifter isn't participating in the ritual for a wish, but instead for the carnage.
He views the wish as a "bonus".
The Drifter has lived for centuries.
His age is unknown, but he refers to New York as "New Amsterdam",
which implies he's been around at least since 1665.
He also implies that he knew
Doc Holliday
from the 19th century.
Drifter is not the
Troubadour
.
He has never met him before, and only knows him by reputation.
Drifter speaks in a
Cajun
accent from Louisiana, indicating that he may be associated with 17th century
Acadian
French immigrants.
Drifter has been hunted by the
Baxter Society
, the
Swords of Saint Benedict
, and
Silver
.
The
OSIC
aren't after Drifter.
Drifter seems to be scared of fire, and expresses relief if he doesn't have to fight
Infernus
.
Drifter likes to steal his victim's coats.
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Drifter Start):
"Revel in the massacre, Drifter, it is the Hidden King's gift to you. All he asks in return... is that you summon him."
Drifter
's in-game
voice line
(Select):
"Fact of the matter is: I do this for free. The Patron's gift is just a bonus."
The Doorman
's in-game
voice line
(Drifter Trapped in ult):
"It wont be long before you find yourself feeling something that’s eluded you for centuries: fear."
Drifter
's in-game
voice line
(Select):
"The elders of New Amsterdam are soft, clinging to archaic titles like they grant them real power."
History of New Amsterdam
Drifter
And
Holliday Conversation 3
-
"I know whose gun that is. You gon' be able to make him proud?"
Drifter
's in-game
voice line
(Select):
"The Troubadour ain’t got nothin’ on me."
Drifter
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Holliday):
"Don't worry about the Troubadour, sheriff, worry about me."
Drifter
And
Infernus Conversation 2
Shopkeeper
's in-game
voice line
-
"You Louisiana boys know how to party."
Drifter
And
Grey Talon Conversation 3
-
"What are the boys and girls of the Baxter Society gonna say about us workin' together?"
Drifter
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Venator):
"How many of your order do I gotta kill before you realize you can't stop me?"
Silver
's in-game
voice line
(killed Drifter):
"I got you, you son of a bitch."
Drifter
And
Haze Conversation 1
-
"OSIC finally coming for me?"
-
"No, we're using you. If we were coming for you, you'd already be dead."
Drifter
And
Infernus Conversation 3
Drifter
And
Paradox Conversation 2
Drifter
And
Abrams Conversation 1

Venator.description: Venator is a Hero in Deadlock . He doesn't walk the righteous path, he blazes the trail so that others may do so safely. His biggest challenge is knowing which weapon to use first. Firing a Consecrating Grenade into the fray softens up his enemies and keeps them from restoring health, and his Hex-Lined Snap Trap scatters across the ground to lock them in place. A Gutshot from his shotgun will knock back enemies who get too close, and when the time is right, Ira Domini will rid the world of evil once and for all.
Venator.lore:
“
The Venators of St. Benedict are a Vatican-sanctioned order whose members are deployed to regions with a high concentration of supernatural predators.   Few in number, their modus operandi is to observe, identify, and exterminate. They are methodical, they are precise, and once they identify a threat to the flock they are relentless.
But even amongst those who are called The Sword Of St. Benedict, one stands apart from the others.  A man whose hardened heart has allowed him to pay terrible prices in the name of the greater good... and he has once again been dispatched to New York.
Venator's real name is Quinn Rourke.
He is commonly referred to by his title, "Father",
which is ordinary for Catholic priests.
Venator's mission and motivation in the ritual is to kill the
Patrons
.
He's willing to die to achieve his mission.
There are less than 24 active Venators,
though more have been killed in the past.
The Roman numeral "48" under his name may indicate that he is the 48th Venator.  While there are multiple Venators, they usually work alone.
Venator showcases that he's willing to do whatever he can for the greater good, burdening himself with the sins he commits for the sake of others.
His zealous behavior often causes him to be called "angry" and "unhinged".
He does, however, judge people based on their actions rather than their appearances or species.
The Venators of St. Benedict have a friendly rivalry with the
Baxter Society
.
Venator respects the Baxter Society, though he doesn't always agree with them.
Venator refers to himself as a
Carnifex
, a Latin word for executioner.
Venator's accent is Irish.
His signature is viewable on his thanks for voting poster.
The Archmother
's in-game
voice line
(Venator start):
"Father Quinn, I know you question if this is the right course of action, but it is! The Hidden King threatens us all."
Venator
And
Graves Conversation 1
-
"Believe me, Father, I already regret meeting you."
The Archmother
's in-game
voice line
(Venator start):
"You have slain the things of people's nightmares, but you have never faced someone like the Hidden King. Together, with the Archmother, you have a way to end his reign!"
The Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Venator start):
"Venator, your faith is like iron, your fury righteous, and both will be needed to stop the Archmother!"
The Doorman
's in-game
voice line
(Venator trapped in Baroness):
"I know you're prepared to die here, Venator, which is good, because you shall."
Venator
's in-game
voice line
-
"Less than two dozen men and women have the honor of being called Venator."
<ref>
tag; no text was provided for refs named

's in-game
voice line
(last alive):
"A Venator is used to working alone."
Venator
's in-game
voice line

"I don't get to walk the Righteous path. I blaze the trail so that others may do so safely."
Venator
And
Abrams Conversation 3

"I don't blame you for not having the stomach to do what needed to be done, but sleep easy knowing that what happening in that brownstone is my burden alone, not yours."
Venator
's
other hero interactions

And
Apollo Conversation 2

"Young man, I don't care about the circumstances of your birth, I care about who you are. I don't give a damn if you look like a monster… but if you act like one, I will put you down."

"The Carnifex Right is not somethin' to be taken lightly."

Victor.description: Victor is a Hero in Deadlock who walks the line between life and death. Victor has learned to harness pain, shocking himself with Jumpstart to get his adrenaline rushing and his faulty heart pumping. He welcomes incoming damage with open (albeit mismatched) arms, channeling it into his Pain Battery and granting enemies a taste of the pain he endures. Get too close and risk getting caught in his Aura of Suffering, but hey, at least you'll be suffering together. And just when you think you've taken him down, he'll piece himself back together and live again!
Victor.lore:
“
A lot of people spend their whole lives wondering who they really are. For Victor, this existential question is made more complicated as he woke up on a mortuary table with no knowledge of his creator, why he was made, and whom he is made of.
Now searching the five boroughs for answers, Victor is hoping to find someone who can identify any part of him.
Victor is made out of dead body parts.
Though he has been searching for a while, he has yet to find the origins of any of his body parts.
Because he doesn't know where pieces of his body come from, he hasn't replaced or discarded any limbs.
It's implied that Victor's physical condition is deteriorating, and his left arm keeps falling off.
Victor's in constant chronic pain, with the only relief being from
The Cube
.
Victor's willing to do anything for answers on his origins.
Victor
And
Ivy Conversation 2
-
"I'm in chronic pain, and my body's stitched together from corpses I can't Identify."
Victor
And
Infernus Conversation 3
-
"You figure out where any of you came from yet?"
-
"No."
Victor
And
Bebop Conversation 2
-
"I'm not trying to be rude but... How much of you is... Original you? Well not original per se, but-"
-
"I see where you're going. No. I haven't had to swap out parts yet. Probably should. My left arm keeps popping off. But it doesn't feel right to discard it when I don't even know who they were."
<ref>
tag; no text was provided for refs named
:2
Victor
's in-game
voice line
(Clutch Cube):
"I... I don't feel pain!"
Victor
's in-game
voice line
(Upgrade Aura of Suffering):
"There's no price I'm not willing to pay for answers."

Paige.description: Paige is a Hero in Deadlock . Citizens of Manhattan will learn to appreciate the power of the written word when Paige joins the fight. With the mere toss of a book she can conjure a Bookwyrm that sears enemies who get too close, or bind them to the ground with Captivating Read. Waning allies will find themselves emboldened by Plot Armor, granting them the courage to fight another day. Fantasy becomes reality with Rallying Charge, summoning an entire cavalry to gallop across the city.
Paige.lore:
“
The daughter of a rare book dealer, Paige grew up in a loving home that prioritized kindness, magic, and storytelling.  But while Paige took naturally to her parents' values, her little brother Bryce did not.
A rebellious teen, Bryce resented not only his family’s saccharine attitude, but also their refusal to let him dabble in magics that they deemed too dangerous.  Paige tried everything she could think of to keep him out of trouble, but like most teenagers, the more his big sister tried to tell him what was best for him, the more he turned away.
Paige doesn't know what Bryce did to get kicked out of the house...just that she came home from the library to find her brother gone and her parents crying.
Days turned to weeks, to months, to years.  Paige grew to become a talented bibliomancer, making a living as a storyteller reading at libraries across the five boroughs; and while her parents have remained silent about what happened with Bryce, Paige's obsession with finding him has only grown.  She will discover what happened to her brother... and no man or god is going to stand in her way.
Paige loves reading all kinds of books, having set times of day for different types of books.
Aside from real-world novels, Paige has read books on
Kelvin
's adventures and the
Baxter Society
.
Paige reads books to kindergarteners.
She loved showing off Bookwyrm at the library, but was forced to stop after the dragon burnt some books.
Paige describes her brother Bryce as a curmudgeon.
Paige likes heroic men
and has a crush on
Mirage
,
Shiv
and
Victor
.
She had a diary in high school where she wrote about byronic heroes.
Paige
And
Billy Conversation 1
-
"You can't read more than one book at a time."
-
"Well sure, but... you need your breakfast book that gets you going, your coffee book for when you need a little break that you secretly want to be a long break, you got your main book that you're working on, which I'm assuming that's what you meant when you said one book at a time, and then you have your comfort book for when you had a bad day and you just want to disappear on the purple line."
Paige
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Kelvin):
"He was as impressive as the stories said!"
Paige
And
Grey Talon Conversation 2
-
"I read a book on the Baxter Society once."
Paige
's in-game
voice line
-
"You know, I would love to help, but I've got a kindergarten class to read to."
Ivy
's in-game
voice line
-
"And she was so nice when I took Manny to story hour!"
Paige
's in-game
voice line
(upgrade Bookwyrm):
"Had to stop pulling this guy out of the library, they were not too happy when I burned the stacks, heh!"
Paige
's in-game
voice line
(upgrade Bookwyrm):
"I don't get to pull this bad boy out at Storytime as much as I'd like!"
Paige
's in-game
voice line
(killed McGinnis) -
"And I thought my brother was a curmudgeon."
Paige
's in-game
voice line
(Upgrade Rallying Charge):
"Doesn't get much more romatic than knights on horseback."
Paige
's in-game
voice line
(Select):
"Got my Wuthering Heights... I mean, that one’s probably less useful, but you never know when you’ll need a byronic hero for something romantic yet dangerous!"
<ref>
tag; no text was provided for refs named
:1
Paige
's in-game
voice line
(pass Shiv on zipline):
"I'm a sucker for a man with a tortured past."
Paige
And
Victor Conversation 1
-
"Never put on a shirt."
Paige
's in-game
voice line
(Killed Victor):
"Maybe he'll get even moodier!"
Paige
And
Victor Conversation 1
-
"You know, earlier I made a joke about byronic heroes but seeing you here makes it less of a joke and more like I made my highschool diary come to life. [Nervous giggle]"

The Doorman.description: The Doorman is a Hero in Deadlock . He's proper, he's polite, but the humble Doorman of The Baroness Hotel is more than meets the eye. A brisk ring of his Call Bell leaves nearby enemies disoriented, and his high-speed Luggage Cart knocks them right off their feet. Do you find yourself getting lost easily in the streets of Manhattan? Don't worry, The Doorman is here to provide a shortcut with his Doorway whenever the need arises. And only the most special of enemies get to experience the trip of a lifetime to The Baroness Hotel.
The Doorman.lore:
“
He's proper, he's polite, but the humble Doorman of The Baroness Hotel is more than meets the eye.
While he had only planned to experience life on this plane for a few weeks, The Doorman quickly discovered that the New York service industry was a great way to see the strange demands that please humans.
The Doorman is referred to as a fledgling god (by himself),
a Patron (by himself)
and a cosmic being.
He often refers to the other heroes as "mortals".
The Doorman's motivation in the ritual is to see the
Patrons
, since he hasn't seen them in a long time.
He doesn't seem to have a wish planned as he intends to return to the
Baroness
after the ritual,
although the Patrons goad him to wish back his old power.
"The Doorman" is not the Doorman's real name, but one he uses to "keep himself grounded" to remind himself that he's here to serve, not to rule.
There are lines which imply that, a long time ago, Doorman used to slaughter humans, expressing glee at the chance to kill again and be feared during the ritual.
The true nature of the Doorman is unknown to most of the cast.
The Doorman likes working at the
Baroness
since he gets to observe humanity.
The
OSIC
seem to be aware of the Doorman's true nature, as they consider Doorman participating in the ritual as "overstepping".
The Doorman claims to be able to see the future.
The Doorman
's in-game
voice line
(ult on himself) -
"Reality twists and bends around you. How can this be? Has the Baroness turned on its loyal servant, or has a fledgling god lost his mind in the face of the patrons?"
The Doorman
's in-game
voice line
(killstreak):
"Don't you fools get it? I am the Patron you should worry about angering!"
Mina
's in-game
voice line
-
"Of course they left it to me to kill the cosmic being."
The Doorman
's
in-game
voice line
(Pre-Game Ping):
"I am excited to help you mortals enrich your meaningless lives!"
The Doorman
's in-game
voice line
(High Killstreak):
"Mortals, your pointless lives are about to come to an end!"
<ref>
tag; no text was provided for refs named
:0
The Doorman
's in-game
voice line
(post-game ping):
"Meddling in the Patrons' affairs is always satisfying."
The Doorman
's in-game
voice line
(pre-game ping):
"The sooner we complete the ritual, the sooner I can return to my duties at the Baroness."
The Doorman
's in-game
voice line
(post-game ping):
"I must return to the Baroness."
Patrons
in-game
voice line
(Doorman start):
"You've shed your trappings to walk amongst humanity, but now you reclaim your rightful place!"
The Doorman & Paige Conversation 3
-

:
"Well that’s not your name." -
The Doorman
:
"It’s not, but for my purposes in New York it helps me stay grounded, that I am here to serve and not to rule."

"I haven't slaughtered man like this for years, what a treat!"
The Doorman
's in-game
voice line
(Medium Killstreak):
"I forgot how wonderful it can feel to be feared."
The Doorman
's
other character interactions

-
Victor
:
"Catering to rich people is rewarding?"
-
The Doorman
:
"Observing humanity is."
Haze
's in-game
voice line
(killed The Doorman):
"You overstepped, Doorman."
The Doorman
's in-game
voice line
-
"Ivy, you're a good person, and I have no desire to torment you here. Just know this: In five years one of the Arroyos is going to die, and there is nothing you can do to stop it."

Billy.description: Billy is a Hero in Deadlock . A white hot ball of rage, furious at the very notion of... something. Billy is a chaotic front-liner who never backs down from a challenge. With Rising Ram he gets up close and personal, before slamming down with Bashdown to create shockwaves through his enemies. Running isn't even an option when Billy can use his ultimate Chain Gang to grapple enemies and pull them back in. A quick swig from his bottle gets him Blasted, and his enemies totally wrecked.
Billy.lore:
“
Billy is a white hot ball of rage, furious at the very notion of...something.  Maybe it’s the cops.  Maybe it’s magic regulations.  Maybe it’s the service at the gyro place downtown.  (Not the good one.  The other one.)
Don't ask him how he got the goat head.
Billy's wish is unknown, although the
Patrons
imply that Billy wants to change the world due to it being "corrupt and beyond saving."
Billy got his goat head by using eldritch powers/black magic.
He implies he turned his head into a goat for a specific reason.
Billy criticizes a Shakespearean Festival, but considers going once
Paige
points out that people there would view him as "their king."
Billy enjoys rioting and looting in New York,
although he thinks he's the only one allowed to start fires in "his" city (he does accept public rioting if the
Knickerbockers
win the basketball championship).
Billy used to use Rising Ram in
circle pits
before being told to stop.
It's implied Billy uses
Shadow Weave
to escape the police after committing crimes.
Despite being an anarchist, Billy still pays his taxes.
Billy believes the
Baxter Society
never killed real monsters and that it was all a publicity stunt.
Billy doesn't believe the
Adversary
exists until he sees it with his own eyes.
Amber Hand
's in-game
voice line
(Billy start):
"The world is corrupt and beyond saving! But if you summon me, I can help you change that."
Amber Hand
's in-game
voice line
(Billy start):
"Injustice permeates this city like a weed! You know this. Complete the ritual, and together, we will build a new world!"
Billy
's in-game
voice line
(killed Seven) -
"You think you're special because you got eldritch power? Newsflash, buddy, where do you think the goat head came from?"
Billy
's in-game
voice line
(killed Seven) -
"Only difference between you and me is that I never got arrested for doing some black magic, cause I'm not a moron leaning over his skis."
Billy
's in-game
voice line
(upgrade Rising Ram) -
"It ain't why I turned my head into a goat, but it's a hell of a perk."
Billy
And
Paige Conversation 3
Billy
's in-game
voice line
(unselect):
"I got a riot to start in midtown."
Billy
's in-game
voice line
(unselect):
"You go complete the ritual, I got some lootin’ to do."
Billy
's in-game
voice line
(killed Infernus):
"The only person that sets fire in my city is me!.. Unless the Knickerbockers win the championship, then I'm fine with a little public rioting. But in general, just me!"
Billy
's in-game
voice line
(upgrade Rising Ram):
"I used to do this in circle pits before venues started being babies."
Billy
's in-game
voice line
(use Shadow Weave):
"How do you think I get away from the cops so much?"
Billy
's in-game
voice line
(Haze ult multikill) -
"So that's where my tax dollars go."
Billy
's in-game
voice line
(Use Holliday's Bounce Pad) -
"I pay your salary, Holliday, I can use this!"
Billy & Grey Talon Conversation 2
-
Billy
:
"I bet the Baxter Society never killed any real monsters. It was all a bunch of smoke and mirrors for publicity."
Billy
's in-game
voice line
(killed Viscous):
"I'll believe the Adversary exists when I see it with my own eyes."

Graves.description: Graves is a Hero in Deadlock . The dead have been making a whole lot of demands lately, and only Graves has the courage to oblige. That severed lich hand she found in the cemetery has proven itself a valuable ally, allowing her to latch onto her enemies and steal their power for herself. Her curiosities about the passage of life are further put to use with Jar of Dead, collecting the remains of the fallen, shaking them up, and throwing them back at her enemies to grant those remorseful spirits a final shot at revenge. With Grasping Hands she strikes a deep crack in the earth, allowing those down below to grab onto enemies' ankles and stop them from escaping her reach. And when all else fails, a Borrowed Decree will summon the dead to fight alongside her.
Graves.lore:
“
The daughter of high-power defense attorneys, Darcy Graves grew up in a home where every conversation was a debate, argument, or negotiation. It was exhausting. But while her parents were often too busy meeting with clients or working on cases to bond with her, the dead were always there to listen.
Graves enjoyed her time in the cemetery.  It was a quiet place to calm her thoughts and talk through her problems...but one day her one-sided conversations started to change.
It began with a faint whisper.  A woman's voice that seemed to respond to Graves' complaints.  Intrigued, the teenager listened...and followed the voice's instructions until it guided her to a lead-lined box buried in Van Cortlandt Park.  But while most high school students would freak out if they were to unearth a severed lich hand, Graves was certainly not most teens.  The hand now free of its prison, the lich's voice grew stronger... It had spent years looking to find a student she could pass her knowledge to, and Graves was eager to learn.
Now a fledgling necromancer, Darcy balances not only her homework at Blackmore Academy...but the demands of graveyard denizens, each of whom have their own unfinished business that they seek her aid in resolving.
Graves' motivation in the ritual is unknown, but she seems to be fighting on behalf of her mentor: the lich.
Graves idolises the lich and considers her her best friend.
There are some implications, however, that the lich is just using Graves to get what she wants.
While occasionally warned about the dangers of a lich's hand, Graves ignores the warnings.
According to the
Patrons
, Graves works tirelessly to honor the dead and grant them peace, and many souls are in her debt.
She considers her role as a voice for the dead as "an honor."
Graves seems to like cats, showing affection for
Ava
(despite pointing out how ugly she is)
and believing that the world would probably be better off if 90% of humans were replaced by cats.
Graves once wrote an essay about
Johann Geist
in a humanities course.
She's currently writing a paper on
Wuthering Heights
.
Graves has a sister.
Graves does babysitting.
While Graves' age hasn't been mentioned, she shares classes with
Apollo
, who is 18 years old.
The Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Graves start):
"Your devotion to your mentor is admirable, Graves. Use what she taught you to complete the ritual."
Graves
' in-game
voice line
(select):
"This should make my mentor happy."
Graves
' in-game
voice line
(Unselect):
"I think there’s safer ways to help my mentor."
Graves
' in-game
voice line
(Upgrade Borrowed Decree):
"What's the point of having a lich for a best friend if I can't tap into her power?"
Graves
' in-game
voice line
(upgrade Essence Theft):
"I need to appease my mentor."
Krill
's in-game
voice line
(killed Graves):
"The poor girl didn't even realize she was being used."
Haze
's in-game
voice line
(killed Graves):
"Killed the lich's pawn."
Graves
And

Apollo.description: Apollo is a Hero in Deadlock . With Flawless Advance the fencer begins his approach, timing his strikes perfectly to inflict more damage. Counter-attacks aren't a concern for Apollo, as a flourish of his blade deflects the damage and triggers a quick Riposte, and Disengaging Sigil allows him to jump out of the fray with ease. For his final blow, Apollo dons his fencer's mask and channels Ixia 's might with Itani Lo Sahn, leaving enemies defeated in his wake.
Apollo.lore:
“
A land of beauty, tradition and conflict; North Ixia is no stranger to brutal political violence. So when Apollo was told that it was for his own safety he was being sent to New York for school, he knew the situation was serious.
Adjusting to life at Blackmore Academy didn’t come easy to Apollo. His school was supposed to be filled with The Cursed Apple’s best and brightest but all he saw, with few exceptions, was a sea of aggressive mediocrity. Electing not to waste his time with frivolous things like parties and dances, he instead put his energy on the piste, where he rigorously trains as captain of the Blackmore fencing team.
However, at the end of the day Apollo does not fret too much on the tedium of life in New York. He knows that eventually the time will come when his father will call on him to come home and he will get to show that he is worthy of wielding his family's ancestral blade.
Apollo is 18 years old
and is referred to as "
the Prince of
Ixia
"
or "
Crown Prince of North Ixia",
though he finds the title inaccurate.
His father is referred to as a warlord, and has the authority equivalent to a governor and a general.
Apollo is proud of his father and believes his father is proud of him.
His father says "loyalty is everything" and "the first step to victory begins with crushing the enemy's hope".
When killing
Silver
, Apollo mentions that his father would've turned her into a cloak.
Apollo holds his Ixian culture in very high regard.
He refers to the other playable Ixians,
Abrams
and
Infernus
, as his "brothers".
While he doesn't hate humans, he believes Ixians are above them.
Apollo is content at
Blackmore Academy
,
but he refuses to see New York as his home and is only here because his father wanted him to be.
Ixian is his native language.
His ultimate "
Itani Lo Sahn
" is Ixian for "
I have no equal
".
Apollo was taught fencing at a young age, having learned Riposte when he was only 5 years old.
He seems to be a fencing champion,
and hopes to one day represent Ixia at the Olympics.
Apollo inherited his sword from his father.
Apollo's wish is unknown, but he seems to be fighting for the sake of Ixia.
While mentioned that Apollo's father expects great things from him,
Apollo claims that he isn't fighting in the ritual for his father.
Apollo is extremely confident in his skills and believes himself to be the best.
He holds honor and discipline in high regards.
His attitude often causes other characters to regard him as vain.
Apollo says his life has been personally affected by political assassinations.
Notably, while he speaks often of his father, he never mentions his mother.
The symbol etched in Disengaging Sigil is Apollo's family sigil.
He has fond memories of his father teaching him how to cast it.
Apollo has no siblings.
Apollo believes
Maximilian Fairfax
is a "great man".
Both Apollo and his father are fans of
Fairfax Industries
.
Apollo
And
Celeste Conversation 3
-
"Most 18-year-olds aren't about to summon an Elder God."

's in-game
voice line

"The prince of Ixia will stand triumphant!"

"That's not my title."

-

Rem.description: Rem is a Hero in Deadlock . An accidental stowaway from the world of dreams, Rem has found himself stranded in the city that never sleeps. Pillow fights are Rem's preferred form of conflict, tossing his favorite pillow at enemies to knock them back when they're getting too close. His friends, however, he likes to keep nearby - leaping to their aid when things get dicey and taking a quick nap on their shoulder. His Lil Helpers are curious creatures, taking interest in everything the streets of New York have to offer, and cheering on his allies as they go. Ultimately when Naptime hits, no one will be able to keep their eyes open.
Rem.lore:
“
An accidental stowaway from the world of dreams, Rem has found himself stranded in the city that never sleeps.  Driven by his curious nature, Rem and his helpful friends have been seen wandering across the five boroughs in search of a way back home.
So if you ever find yourself dozing off while taking the Blue line home from work, maybe you’ve just had an encounter with one of the Cursed Apple’s newest denizens.
Rem's motivation in the ritual is to find a way back to his home.
Rem's exact species is unknown,
although he is called a familiar.
Rem
molts
.
While his age is unknown, Rem is heavily implied to be a child,
exhibiting childlike characteristics.
Rem can't read.
Rem can see people's dreams when they're asleep. This allows him to learn information he wouldn't normally know, such as how to speak
Ixian
,
that
Mo
wants to audit a pottery class,
or
Yamato
's true name.
Rem has a family who misses him.
Rem brought his lucky pillow to the ritual.
The Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Rem start):
"There's no need to be scared, Rem. Once you complete the ritual, the Hidden King will find your way home."
Rem
's in-game
voice line
(select):
"I summon patron, then I go home."
Rem
And
Holliday Conversation 1

's
conversations

Silver.description: Silver is a Hero in Deadlock , making her living tracking down lowlifes, but today New York’s misanthrope lycanthrope plans on summoning a god. Fortunately, her career as a bounty hunter has prepared her well for all that the ritual requires. She makes quick work of adversaries by catching them with her Entangling Bola, Boot Kicking them in the face, and finishing them off with a Slam Fire from her rifle. But inevitably, the Lycan Curse comes calling whether she likes it or not, and her foes will regret being too close when it does.
Silver.lore:
“
Lilah Silver is a mess.  She drinks too much, she smokes too much, and the less is said about her personal life the better.   But despite Silver's flaws she has managed to carve out a career as a successful bounty hunter, and while she would like to think that her successes are solely because she has incredible intuition, the fact that she’s a werewolf doesn’t hurt.
Silver's goal in the ritual is to get money and sort her life out.
She hates her life and is aware of her self-destructive tendencies.
Silver has a habit of spending all of her money on rent or alcohol.
While she doesn't love being a bounty hunter, she believes she isn't good at anything else and would end up homeless if she didn't do a job that paid well.
Silver has been a werewolf for as long as she can remember.
She claims to have her Lycanthropy under control.
Despite this, Silver seems unable to control her transformation due to it triggering automatically in-game without her compliance.
Silver tries to take bounties in alive, although her methods usually end up killing them.
She's brought
Vyper
into custody on several occasions and is after a bounty on
The Troubadour
.
Silver has an unnamed ex-partner who accused her of pushing people away.
Silver once got kicked out of the
Baroness Hotel
during brunch.
Silver
's in-game
voice line
(select):
"Doing this for money and... well... just money."
Silver
's in-game
voice line
(select):
"There have got to be easier ways to get my life together..."
Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Silver start) -
"Lilah Silver. Yours is a…complicated life. But if you complete the ritual, The King will make sure you thrive."
Silver
And
Seven Conversation 1
-
"Seven, I don't do my job out of a sense of justice. I do it to pay rent. And if we win today, that won't be a problem anymore. So, trust me. I got no problem workin' with you if it means we win."
Silver
's in-game
voice line
(desperate Entangling Bola):
"God, I hate my life..."
Silver
's in-game
voice line
(escape on zipline):
"I'm self-destructive, not stupid."
Silver
's in-game
voice line
(T4 shop reminder):
"Well, look at that! I learned how to save money for something other than rent or whiskey."
Silver
's in-game
voice line
(select):
"Why does this have the one thing I'm good at? Why couldn't I have stuck with piano?"
Silver
And
Graves Conversation 3
-
"You always want to be a bounty hunter?"
-
"Nah, I always wanted to not be homeless so I decided to do whatever paid the most."
Silver
And
Graves Conversation 2
Silver
And

Silver

Silver

Celeste.description: Celeste is a Hero in Deadlock . It's not every day that Coney Island's biggest star, The Dazzling Celeste, performs on the streets of Manhattan. Her show begins with Light Eater, where a deep breath lit by her blazing baton coats enemies in front of her, and grants increased damage against them. Following that up, she envelops herself in the prismatic shield of her Dazzling Trick, which explodes and silences nearby enemies who break it. Try not to get distracted by her gliding gracefully through the air, or by the dance of her Radiant Daggers, as you'll regret being underneath them when they rain down from above. As for her memorable final act, the Shining Wonder will make her allies go OOH and her foes go AGGHHH!
Celeste.lore:
“
Even in a world of magic, some things are still rare and unusual. So what is a unicorn to do?  Announce her presence to the world and potentially have poachers looking to saw off her horn? Or hide in plain sight at a Coney Island Side Show where most folk would assume her appearance was just part of an act?
Over the years "The Dazzling Celeste" has grown into one of the more popular attractions on Coney, and while the applause from a cheering audience is appreciated; what keeps her waking up in the morning is the found family she's made at work.
Keruba the Mermaid.
Blockhead Lenny.
Chickenwing.
Ted.
These were her people.  So when she discovered that one of her own sold part of their soul in order to cover a gambling debt, Celeste knew it was time to step out of the shadows and do whatever it takes to get it back.  Is revealing her power to The Patrons a risk?  Yes.  But that's tomorrow's problem... her family needs help today.
Celeste's existence is questioned by skeptics who don't believe unicorns are real.
Some of them believe that she glued a horn to her head.
Only her closest friends know her true identity.
Celeste hates hurting other people, expressing remorse when killing enemies.
Celeste has frequently caused accidents when performing or training her acts.
She used to close kids' birthday parties with her Light Eater ability until she faced multiple lawsuits.
She also took Shining Wonder out of her act after causing too many concussions.
The
Paradox Organisation
have tried to steal Celeste's horn.
It's implied that Lenny is the friend who sold his soul.
The Archmother
's in-game
voice line
(Celeste start):
"Even in a world of magic, people question your very existence. It's wrong. But the Archmother can set things right."
Celeste
And
Graves Conversation 1
Celeste
's in-game
voice line
-
"Even in a world where magic surrounds us, skeptics abound."
Celeste
's in-game
voice line
(upgrade Radiant Daggers):
"Let's see 'em say I glue a horn to my head now!"
The Hidden King
's in-game
voice line
(Celeste start):
"You hide who you are from all but your closest confidants. This need not be the case. Summon the Hidden King, and usher in a new world with you by her side!"
Celeste
's in-game
voice line
(generic kill):
"I hate this!"
Celeste
's in-game
voice line
(generic kill):
"I wish it didn't have to be this way..."
Celeste
's in-game
voice line
(upgrade Light Eater) -
"I haven't had to call the fire department in a while, so I think I'm getting the hang of it."
Celeste
's in-game
voice line
(select):
"I'm not a one-trick pony!.. I got like four. Five if you count the one where I get an injured audience member not to sue."
Celeste
's in-game
voice line
(upgrade Light Eater) -
"This used to be my closer at kids birthday parties until Julia McClomsky and her lawsuits came along."
Celeste
's in-game
voice line
(use Shining Wonder) -
"I took this out of my routine after causing too many concussions, but seems like a good time to dust it off."
Celeste
's in-game
voice line
(killed Paradox):
"Sick of those assholes trying to steal my horn..."
Infernus
And
Celeste Conversation 1

lore.title: Astral Gates
lore.content:
Astral Gates
are rifts in space and time connected to the
Outer Planes
. It is thought that
celestial events
could awaken them.
[
1
]
Professor
Dynamo
is a known authority on Astral Gate research,
[
2
]
and he inspired
Seven
to do his own research.
[
3
]
Known Gates
[
edit
|
edit source
]
There are 7 known Astral Gates and 1 rumoured, five of these have been mentioned so far.
New York
- An Astral Gate was opened in Central Park, which lead to
Dynamo
's body being atomised upon investigating it.
Atlantic Ocean
- An Astral Gate may have been open in the Bermuda Triangle since as early as the year 565
[
4
]
as entities such as the Loch Ness Monster have escaped from the gate. It has also recently released something far more predatory, leading
Viscous
to seek out
The Patrons
in order to keep The Deep safe.
Europe
-  A dormant Astral Gate has recently been discovered.
[
1
]
Puerto Rico
- The discovery of an Astral Gate led to the annexation of Puerto Rico by the
United States
.
[
5
]
Arctic Circle (Rumoured)
- There is rumoured to be an 8th Astral Gate, a science team assembled by
Kelvin
set off to try and discover it. However, the team disappeared and Kelvin was the only body recovered.
At least one of the Astral Gates leads to the plane of
Ixia
.
[
6
]
References
[
edit
|
edit source
]
↑
1.0
1.1
Newscaster
's in-game
voice line
-
"In world news: A 7th astral gate has been found in Europe. While dormant, experts wonder if the celestial event could cause it to open. For this story and more pick up your copy of The New York Oracle today."
↑
Newscaster
's in-game
voice line
-
"Read our exclusive interview with Professor Dynamo to hear his thoughts on Astral Gates, the eclipse, and what it's like to live life without a body."
↑
Seven and Dynamo conversation
-
Seven:
I'm a fan of your work, Professor. (...) Your research into the Astral Gates paved the way for my own. In my rare moments of doubt, sometimes I even wonder if I would have become the man I am were it not for you.
↑
Wikipedia (Loch Ness Monster)
- Earliest known sighting
↑
2024-08-31 -
Yoshi
; Deadlock Discord -
"US has 52 states, 51st is Puerto Rico which gained statehood after one of the gates to outer planes was discovered there. The 52nd is South Ixia (outer plane of Ixia where Infernus' parents immigrated from)"
↑
2024-09-03 -
Yoshi
; Deadlock Discord - "
Ixia is one of the outer planes that is connected to our world via an astral gate."

lore.title: Baroness Hotel
lore.content:
The Baroness, located at Broadway in-game.
“
I think you’ll find the service at The Baroness to be… exemplary.
—
The Doorman
The Baroness Hotel
is a location in the
Cursed Apple
and the domain of
The Doorman
.
Overview
[
edit
|
edit source
]
The Baroness Hotel is located on Broadway in the Cursed Apple, as well as being used for
The Doorman
's ultimate. The hotel is described by The Doorman as "the finest luxuries this plane can offer"
[
1
]
, although
Lady Geist
believes that the Baroness' standards "went to hell".
[
2
]
The luxuries of the Baroness include bottomless mimosas,
[
3
]
an in-house tailor,
[
4
]
Egyptian cotton sheets,
[
5
]
a sauna,
[
5
]
spa days
[
6
]
and brunches.
[
7
]
The Doorman has worked at the Baroness since its inception.
[
8
]
Mirage
and
Nashala
are currently guests at the Baroness.
[
9
]
[
10
]
Carlos
and
Maria Arroyo
planned a date night at the hotel.
[
11
]
Ms. Shelly
has a brunch scheduled at the Baroness.
[
12
]
The Baroness used to be known as "the most haunted hotel in America", but has lost the title after
the Troubadour
's actions in Macomb. Now it is only the most haunted hotel in the tri-state area.
[
13
]
At some point, the Baroness required the services of the
Baxter Society
.
[
13
]
Other known workers of the Baroness are Jacques,
[
14
]
and Francis.
[
15
]
Gameplay
[
edit
|
edit source
]
In-game, the Baroness can be found next to
the Archmother
's blue
Guardian
. It has two
Denizen
spawn rooms:
A room with
3 small denizens
.
A room with
2 medium denizens
and a
Sinners Sacrifice machine
.
The Doorman's ultimate ability Hotel Guest sends an enemy to a supernatural hallway in the Baroness, which they need to escape from.
Trivia
[
edit
|
edit source
]
The Baroness' design is based on the
Plaza Hotel
in New York.
There is a real-life
Baroness Hotel
in Seattle, WA, close to Valve's office in Bellevue.
Calico
,
[
16
]
Lady Geist
,
[
2
]
Mirage
,
[
9
]
Ivy
,
[
17
]
Wraith
[
18
]
and
Apollo
[
19
]
[
20
]
have stayed at the Baroness before.
Vyper
has also stayed at the Baroness before, but was kicked out.
[
21
]
Victor
has been invited to the Baroness.
[
4
]
Paradox
is trying, and failing, to gain access to the Baroness.
[
22
]
There is a brunch going on at the Baroness during the ritual.
[
7
]
While inside the Baroness, you can hear distant talking and plates clinking.
[
23
]
A piano medley can be heard while inside the Baroness.
[
24
]
The area used for Hotel Guest (The Doorman's ultimate) is located underneath the map.
